1000667432.english: - BoRyeon spoke energetically and began the massage.

1000667435.english: - It felt so good that I unknowingly fell asleep.
1000667435.korean: - 마사지가 너무 기분 좋아서 나도 모르게 잠들고 말았다.

1000667436.english: Hehe, seeing you sleep so peacefully made me feel really rewarded. That just proves my massage skills are top-notch, right?
1000667436.korean: 후후, 손님이 주무시는 모습을 보고 저도 무척 보람찼어요. 그만큼 제 마사지 솜씨가 좋았던 거죠?

1000667437.english: Hmph~ I was born for this, after all.

1000667438.english: Since we're on the topic, would you like to try some of the other services as well?
1000667438.korean: 이왕 말이 나왔으니 다른 서비스도 받아 보시겠어요?

1000667439.english: - She must mean things like skin care or aromatherapy.
1000667439.korean: - 피부관리나 아로마 테라피 같은 걸 말하는 거겠지?

1000667440.english: Hehe, then I'll make you feel even better.
1000667440.korean: 후후, 그러면 더 기분 좋게 해드릴게요.

1000667441.english: - Saying that, BoRyeon climbed on top of me with her back turned.
1000667441.korean: - 보련은 그렇게 말하고 내 위에 등을 보이게 올라탔다.

1000667442.english: - And then, she reached for my pants…

1000667444.english: What kind of service do you think it is~?

1000667445.english: Hehe, what sort of thoughts are you having?
1000667445.korean: 후후, 어떤 생각을 하고 계신 걸까요?

1000667446.english: - BoRyeon laughed playfully and ran her hands over my body.
1000667446.korean: - 보련은 장난스럽게 웃으며 내 몸을 더듬었다.

1000667448.english: - With her back still turned to me, BoRyeon spoke.
1000667448.korean: - 보련은 나에게 등을 보인 채 말했다.

1000667450.english: Do you know what kind of place Aqua Land is?

1000667451.english: - It won't be asking what kind of place Aqua Land is now.
1000667451.korean: - 지금의 아쿠아 랜드가 어떤 곳인지 묻는 것은 아닐 것이다.

1000667452.english: - I recalled the materials I had seen long ago about Aqua Land. And at the same time…
1000667452.korean: - 나는 옛날에 봤던 아쿠아 랜드에 관한 자료를 떠올렸다. 그리고 동시에…

1000667453.english: - I thought of theme parks too.

1000667454.english: Aqua Land is indeed a health leisure facility. But that's only part of Aqua Land.
1000667454.korean: 아쿠아 랜드가 건강 레저 시설인 것은 맞아요. 하지만 그건 아쿠아 랜드의 일부죠.

1000667455.english: Aqua Land was a place that secretly fulfilled uglier desires as well.
1000667455.korean: 아쿠아 랜드는 좀 더 은밀하고, 추악한 욕망도 함께 채워주는 곳이었어요.

1000667456.english: Desires for health, desires for beauty, desires for sex… even desires for destruction…
1000667456.korean: 건강에 대한 욕망, 미모에 대한 욕망, 성에 대한 욕망… 파괴욕까지…

1000667457.english: ……I didn't live through that era, but knowledge of it exists in my head.
1000667457.korean: ……저는 그 시절을 겪지 않았지만, 제 머릿속에는 거기에 대한 지식이 있어요.

1000667458.english: How to make a guest healthy, how to groom them to be more beautiful, how to… make the guest happy.
1000667458.korean: 어떻게 해야 손님을 건강하게 만들어 드릴 수 있는지, 더 예쁘게 가꿀 수 있는지, 어떻게 해야… 손님을 기쁘게 할 수 있는지.

1000667460.english: - Knowing what the old Aqua Land had been and yet thoughtlessly keeping the waterpark's name as Aqua Land.
1000667460.korean: - 과거의 아쿠아 랜드가 어떤 곳인지 알고 있으면서 아무런 생각 없이 워터파크의 이름을 그대로 아쿠아 랜드라고 정하다니.

1000667461.english: - I overlooked that the name Aqua Land might remind someone of unpleasant memories.
1000667461.korean: - 아쿠아 랜드라는 이름이 누군가에게는 좋지 않은 기억을 떠올릴 수도 있다는 것을 간과했다.

1000667462.english: - However… it isn't without a solution.

1000667463.english: ……Heh heh, it's supposed to be a service to make you feel good, but I've only said unpleasant things.
1000667463.korean: ……헤헤, 기분 좋기 위한 서비스인데, 기분 나쁜 소리만 했네요.

1000667464.english: Shall we end it here, guest?

1000667466.english: - I made BoRyeon turn back to look at me.

1000667468.english: This… you called it a service… but it's not really a service.
1000667468.korean: 이거… 서비스라고 말했는데… 사실 서비스 아니에요.

1000667472.english: I do this because I like Big Brother.

1000667473.english: - BoRyeon laid her body over mine.
1000667473.korean: - 보련은 내 위에 자신의 몸을 포갰다.

1000667474.english: - After staring into my eyes for a long time, BoRyeon blushed and said,
1000667474.korean: - 보련은 한참 내 눈을 바라보다가 얼굴을 붉히며 말했다.

1000667476.english: Please… make me into an Big Brother shape.

1000667478.english: - To overwrite the old Aqua Land knowledge in BoRyeon with memories of the new Aqua Land.
1000667478.korean: - 보련의 옛 아쿠아 랜드에 대한 지식 위에 새로운 아쿠아 랜드의 기억을 덮어씌우기 위해.

1000667479.english: - So that Aqua Land would no longer be an unpleasant place for her.
1000667479.korean: - 더 이상 아쿠아 랜드가 그녀에게 기분 나쁜 곳이 되지 않게.

1000667480.english: - Midnight came. But on the land of the midnight sun, Svalbard, it was still bright.
1000667480.korean: - 자정이 되었다. 하지만 백야인 스발바르 제도는 여전히 밝았다.

1000667481.english: - As I finished my schedule at Aqua Land and was returning to my room.
1000667481.korean: - 내가 아쿠아 랜드에서의 일정을 마치고 내 방으로 돌아가던 중.

1000667484.english: I will not waste time on such meaningless acts.
1000667484.korean: 그런 무의미한 행위에 시간을 낭비할 생각은 없다.

1000667485.english: I don't care if you take pleasure from it, but do not force your pleasure onto others.
1000667485.korean: 네가 즐거움을 느끼는 것은 상관없지만, 너의 즐거움을 남에게 강요하지 마라.

1000667486.english: Do it only after you know the other person better. Forcing it blindly is another form of violence.
1000667486.korean: 좀 더 상대에 대해서 잘 알고 난 다음에 해라. 무작정 강요하는 것은 다른 형태의 폭력이다.

1000667487.english: - The person who usually goes around insisting others follow rules had no right to say that…
1000667487.korean: - 평소에 남에게 규칙을 지키라고 강요하고 다니는 사람이 할 말은 아닌데…

1000667488.english: - …or rather. The side that breaks rules is worse, right?
1000667488.korean: - ……아니구나. 규칙을 어기는 쪽이 더 나쁜 거였지?

1000667489.english: What are you doing here, Commander?

1000667491.english: - Being suddenly denied on the spot might sting a little…

1000667492.english: If you keep that attitude you'll regret it later.
1000667492.korean: 그런 태도를 보이면 나중에 후회할 텐데?

1000667493.english: Listen carefully. It's the word of an authority.

1000667494.english: Quiet, adjutant! Why are there so many people looking down on me these days!?
1000667494.korean: 시끄럿, 부관! 요즘 날 깔보는 녀석이 왜 이리 많아!?

1000667495.english: Put your hand on your chest and think about it.
1000667495.korean: 자기 가슴에 손을 얹고 생각해 보시죠?

1000667497.english: Why that expression? 'You talk about chests?' you say?
1000667497.korean: 표정이 왜 그러시죠? ‘네가 가슴을 운운해?’라고 말하시죠?

1000667498.english: But… saying something to the real thing is cruel, isn't it…
1000667498.korean: 하지만… 진짜한테 뭐라고 하는 건 잔인하잖아…

1000667499.english: Ha. Ha. Don't you know that that cheap sympathy is crueller?
1000667499.korean: 하. 하. 그 싸구려 동정이 더 잔인한 거 모르시나요?

1000667500.english: - The Doom Bringer's commander and adjutant bickered for a moment.
1000667500.korean: - 둠 브링어의 지휘관과 부관은 잠시 티격태격했다.

1000667501.english: - It's a conversation you can have because you're close.

1000667503.english: - Mei calmed herself after a moment and said.
1000667503.korean: - 메이는 잠시 후 침착을 되찾고 말했다.

1000667504.english: The fireworks preparations are going well. To the point where others might say it's excessive.
1000667504.korean: 불꽃놀이 준비는 잘 되고 있어. 남들이 보면 과하지 않나? 하는 말이 나올 정도로.

1000667505.english: If we wanted, we could set them off right now.
1000667505.korean: 원하면 지금 당장이라도 터트릴 수 있을 정도야.

1000667506.english: Hmph! I'm doing this because I want to, so I don't need compliments.
1000667506.korean: 흥! 내가 하고 싶어서 하는 거니까 칭찬의 말은 필요 없어.

1000667508.english: It's something the commander I like asked for. Of course I'll do it.
1000667508.korean: 내가 좋아하는… 사령관이 부탁한 거잖아. 당연히 들어줘야지.

1000667509.english: Well, if you really want to do something for me… let's go on a date later.
1000667509.korean: 뭐, 굳이 뭔가를 해주고 싶으면… 나중에 데이트나 하자고.

1000667513.english: Commander, didn't you almost achieve enlightenment just now?

1000667517.english: I'm not joking — I'll actually write this down.

1000667518.english: Ah, the years of endurance have turned to tears and are flowing.
1000667518.korean: 아아, 인고의 세월이 눈물이 되어서 흐르네요.

1000667519.english: - The Doom Bringer's commander and adjutant said that and left.
1000667519.korean: - 둠 브링어의 지휘관과 부관은 그런 소리를 하며 떠났다.

1000667521.english: Is that the Mei of Destruction?

1000667522.english: She's different from the Mei I know.
1000667522.korean: 내가 알고 있는 멸망의 메이와는 다르군.

1000667523.english: - Vargr fell silent at my remark and went into thought.
1000667523.korean: - 바르그는 내 말에 입을 다물고 생각에 잠겼다.

1000667524.english: - While I waited for Vargr's next words and looked at her.
1000667524.korean: - 내가 바르그의 다음 말을 기다리며 바르그를 바라보고 있을 때.

1000667526.english: - Yumi appeared with heavy shadows under her eyes.
1000667526.korean: - 눈 밑에 그늘이 잔뜩 진 유미가 나타났다

1000667527.english: Jamming the comms and installing the detection devices are almost finished.
1000667527.korean: 통신 전파 방해, 탐지 장치 설치는 거의 다 끝났어요.

1000667528.english: We only need to install in some southern areas now…
1000667528.korean: 지금 남쪽 일부 지역만 설치하면 되기는 한데…

1000667530.english: If everyone else is working it's fine, but…

1000667531.english: - Yumi glanced at Aqua Land and said.
1000667531.korean: - 유미는 아쿠아 랜드를 곁눈질로 보다가 말했다.

1000667533.english: I thought I could handle it, but the terrain was rougher than expected, we lost devices and had to fetch new ones, so it took a lot of time…
1000667533.korean: 저도 할 수 있을 줄 알았는데… 생각보다 지형이 험해서 이동하고, 장치 잃어버려서 새 거 가져오느라 시간을 많이 써버려서…

1000667535.english: That's what she said. She isn't backing down — she really will rest.
1000667535.korean: 그렇게 말씀하셨어요. 무르기 없어요. 저 진짜 쉴 거예요?

1000667537.english: - Yumi ran up to me and hugged me.

1000667538.english: And gave a deep… kiss… the kind that would embarrass anyone watching… that kind of kiss…
1000667538.korean: - 그리고 진한… 키스를… 남들이 보기에 민망한 그런… 키스를… 그렇고 그런 사이니까 할 수 있는… 그렇고 그런 키스를…

1000667539.english: Hehe, see you next time, Commander.

1000667542.english: - Vargr watched Yumi's retreating figure and said.

1000667543.english: That's not an attitude toward humans.

1000667544.english: ……If anyone has it, it'd be you.

1000667546.english: It's late — what are you doing here?

1000667547.english: I understand it's hard to sleep with no sunset, but a regular routine is necessary to stay healthy.
1000667547.korean: 해가 지지 않으니 잠들기 힘든 것은 이해하지만 규칙적인 생활을 해야 건강을 해치지 않는 법이오.

1000667548.english: Heh heh, hearing such presumptuous worry from you moves me deeply.
1000667548.korean: 후후, 주제넘는 말을 하고도 오히려 걱정해 주는 말을 들으니 감개무량하오.

1000667549.english: Since we've met, I'll give a few reports.
1000667549.korean: 이왕 마주친 김에 몇 가지 보고를 하겠소.

1000667550.english: The deception tactic against the Lemonade Delta fleet is proceeding successfully.
1000667550.korean: 레모네이드 델타의 함대에 대한 기만전술은 성공적으로 진행 중이오.

1000667551.english: And the invasion through the Norwegian Sea has also been secured.
1000667551.korean: 그리고 노르웨이 해를 통한 침공도 방비가 끝났소.

1000667552.english: The moment Delta's fleet enters the Norwegian Sea, they will learn why the fleet led by the Invincible Dragon is undefeated.
1000667552.korean: 델타의 함대가 노르웨이 해로 진입하는 순간, 무적의 용이 이끄는 함대가 왜 불패인지 알게 될 것이오.

1000667553.english: - After finishing the brief report, Dragon looked at Vargr.
1000667553.korean: - 용은 간략하게 보고를 마친 후 바르그를 바라보았다.

1000667554.english: A new member who joined Orca? I am called Invincible Dragon.
1000667554.korean: 오르카에 새로 합류한 대원이오? 소관은 무적의 용이라고 하오.

1000667557.english: - But while Dragon introduced herself proudly, Vargr introduced herself with slight wariness toward her.
1000667557.korean: - 하지만 용이 당당하게 통성명했다면 바르그는 살짝 용을 경계하면서 통성명했다.

1000667558.english: I don't know why, but I feel a sense of familiarity.

1000667559.english: It is an honor to hear such words from the Invincible Dragon.
1000667559.korean: 무적의 용이 그런 소리를 해주니 영광이군.

1000667560.english: - Vargr still answered politely, but seemed unwilling to continue conversation with Dragon.
1000667560.korean: - 바르그는 여전히 예의 바르게 답했지만 용과의 대화를 달가워하지 않는 것처럼 보였다.

1000667561.english: Heh, I would like to continue speaking, but I have other duties to attend to, so I must end it here.
1000667561.korean: 후후, 좀 더 대화를 이어가고 싶지만 소관에게 남은 일이 있는지라 여기서 끝내야겠소.

1000667562.english: Then, until next time, my lord.

1000667564.english: - Vargr watched her back until she disappeared.
1000667564.korean: - 바르그는 용의 뒷모습을 그녀가 사라질 때까지 바라보았다.

1000667565.english: - And while Vargr was focused on Dragon, I looked at Aqua Land.
1000667565.korean: - 그리고 바르그가 용에게 집중하는 동안에 나는 아쿠아 랜드를 바라보았다.

1000667566.english: - Around the dome covering Aqua Land, some members were returning to their lodgings after playing enough, while others were just entering Aqua Land.
1000667566.korean: - 아쿠아 랜드를 덮고 있는 돔 주위에는 아쿠아 랜드에서 충분히 놀고 숙소로 돌아가는 대원과 이제 아쿠아 랜드로 들어가는 대원들이 교차했다.

1000667567.english: - However, both those entering and those leaving were smiling.
1000667567.korean: - 그러나 들어가는 대원도, 나오는 대원도 모두 웃고 있었다.

1000667568.english: - In the past, Aqua Land was a place where Bioroids were sacrificed for pleasure.
1000667568.korean: - 과거의 아쿠아 랜드는 바이오로이드들을 희생시켜 향락을 즐기는 곳이었다.

1000667569.english: - But the Aqua Land to come will not be a place that creates joy by sacrificing Bioroids.
1000667569.korean: - 하지만 앞으로 있을 아쿠아 랜드는 바이오로이드들을 희생시켜 즐거움을 만들어내는 곳이 아닐 것이다.

1000667570.english: - No, it will be made into a place of happiness for all, without sacrificing anyone, not just Bioroids.
1000667570.korean: - 아니, 바이오로이드 뿐만 아니라 그 누구도 희생시키지 않고 모두를 행복한 곳으로 만들 것이다.

1000667571.english: - Some may call it idealism, but I will follow that ideal.
1000667571.korean: - 누군가는 이상론이라고 말하겠지만 나는 그 이상을 따를 것이다.

1000667572.english: - To bring reality one step closer to the ideal.
1000667572.korean: - 현실을 한 발자국이라도 더 이상에 가깝게 만들기 위해서.

1000667576.english: - But she did not deny it either.

1000667578.english: - Well, many things have happened, and I have much to say, but right now there is only one thing to do.
1000667578.korean: - 뭐, 이런저런 일이 많고, 할 말도 많지만 지금 할 일은 하나뿐이다.

1000667579.english: - Let's have fun in Aqua Land!

1000667580.english: <The Water Park Where the Sun Never Sets> To be continued in Part 2.

1000667581.english: So it was all a wasted trip in the end…

1000667583.english: You mean you've become that dangerous?

1000667587.english: When do you think Aqua Land will open?
1000667587.korean: 아쿠아 랜드 개장은 언제 될 거 같아?

1000667588.english: Fortunately, there was no bad news.

1000667589.english: Are the newly planted flowers growing well?
1000667589.korean: 새로 심은 꽃은 잘 자라고 있어?

1000667591.english: I'm going to greet the members returning from their mission.

1000667593.english: Other than worrying about you, nothing much happened.
1000667593.korean: 너희가 걱정되는 것 말고는 별일 없었어.

1000667594.english: Let's hear that later. You all suffered for a long time outdoors.
1000667594.korean: 그건 나중에 듣자. 전부 오랫동안 야외에서 고생했잖아.

1000667595.english: Rest first. If you rest, the others can rest too.
1000667595.korean: 먼저 쉬자. 네가 쉬어야 다른 애들도 쉴 수 있잖아.

1000667596.english: Hm? Tiamat. Do you have something to say?
1000667596.korean: 응? 티아멧. 무슨 할 말 있어?

1000667597.english: Just kidding. How could I forget the promise to hug you when Tiamat returns?
1000667597.korean: 농담이야. 티아멧이 돌아오면 안아주기로 한 약속을 내가 어떻게 잊겠어?

1000667598.english: Rest well today. In a few days, a splendid festival will begin.
1000667598.korean: 오늘은 푹 쉬어. 며칠 후에 멋진 축제가 시작될 테니까.

1000667600.english: I am the commander of Orca. Nice to meet you.

1000667601.korean: 흠흠. 오르카에 합류한 것을 환영해, 갈라테아.

1000667602.english: Yes. I too welcome you once more, Galatea.
1000667602.korean: 응. 나도 다시 한번 더 환영해, 갈라테아.

1000667603.english: First of all… today, rest well…

1000667605.english: Hwahahahaha! Such truly splendid weather for holding the Aqua Land opening ceremony…
1000667605.korean: 흐하하하하하! 아쿠아 랜드 개장식을 열기에 참으로 훌륭한 날씨…

1000667606.english: What was that explosion just now?

1000667607.english: Saying that some facilities cannot be used means the other facilities can be used, right?
1000667607.korean: 몇몇 시설을 이용하지 못한다는 말은 다른 시설은 이용할 수 있다는 말이지?

1000667608.english: The broken facilities can be repaired too, right?

1000667609.english: Good! Then we'll proceed with the opening ceremony as it is!

1000667610.english: What are you waiting for, comrades! Aqua Land awaits us! Charge into Aqua Land!
1000667610.korean: 뭐하나, 제군들! 아쿠아 랜드가 우리를 기다린다! 아쿠아 랜드로 돌격!

1000667615.english: Hmph. Who do you think I am?

1000667616.english: Were you looking at me with eyes like that!?
1000667616.korean: 너 그런 눈으로 날 바라보고 있었던 거야!?

1000667618.english: Fine! I'll show you my skill!

1000667619.english: Yeah… it really is an unfair difficulty.

1000667622.english: Wow, they all look so real.

1000667627.english: That was what I was looking forward to the most…

1000667630.english: Got it. I'll let them know.

1000667637.english: Yeah. I'm checking out the grand bath.

1000667638.english: How do I even get in.

1000667640.english: Because it's obvious it won't just end with a bath, that's the problem.
1000667640.korean: 목욕으로 안 끝날 게 뻔하니까 문제지.

1000667641.english: I was just taking a look around Aqua Land's facilities overall.
1000667641.korean: 그냥 아쿠아 랜드 시설을 전체적으로 둘러보고 있는 중이었어.

1000667642.english: Hmm… but I haven't checked out the massage room yet.
1000667642.korean: 음… 그래도 아직 마사지실은 안 둘러봤어.

1000667646.english: It felt incredibly, incredibly good. As expected of a professional.
1000667646.korean: 엄청 엄청 기분 좋았어. 역시 전문가.

1000667647.english: Since I've started, maybe I should get the full treatment?

1000667651.english: No… I misspoke. If Boyeon doesn't like it, stop it.
1000667651.korean: 아니… 말을 잘못했어. 보련이 싫다면 그만해줘.

1000667652.english: But… if Boyeon wants it, keep going.
1000667652.korean: 하지만… 보련이 하고 싶으면 계속해 줘.

1000667654.english: Hello, Vargr. Did you enjoy Aqua Land?
1000667654.korean: 안녕, 바르그. 아쿠아 랜드에서 잘 놀았어?

1000667655.english: How delightful it is to waste time on meaningless acts.
1000667655.korean: 무의미한 행위에 시간을 낭비하는 게 얼마나 즐거운데.

1000667656.english: If I am happy and wish others to be happy because of that?
1000667656.korean: 내가 즐거우니 남도 즐겁길 바라는 거라면?

1000667660.english: Got it. Contact me when you're free later. I'll set the schedule.
1000667660.korean: 알겠어. 나중에 편한 시간에 연락 줘. 일정 잡아 놓을게.

1000667661.english: I'll record today as an anniversary.

1000667663.english: Even if it's the same model, different experiences change things.
1000667663.korean: 똑같은 모델이라고 하더라도 경험이 다르면 달라지잖아.

1000667664.english: Ah, sorry. Did I schedule things too tightly?
1000667664.korean: 아, 미안해. 일정을 너무 빡빡하게 잡았지?

1000667665.english: Hmm… then let's rest for now and deal with the rest later.
1000667665.korean: 음… 그러면 남은 건 일단 쉬었다가 하자.

1000667666.english: Yes. There are alternative measures, so no need to force anything.
1000667666.korean: 응. 다른 대체 수단들이 있으니까 억지로 목맬 필요는 없지.

1000667667.english: Haha, rest. You did well, Yumi. Leave the rest for next time.
1000667667.korean: 하하, 쉬어. 고생 많았어, 유미. 남은 건 다음에 하자.

1000667668.english: Hm? I'm fine. Is there a problem?

1000667670.english: Because the sun doesn't set, I didn't realize how tired I was.
1000667670.korean: 해가 안 지니까 피곤한 줄을 모르겠더라.

1000667671.english: Yes. I'll remember. Make sure you rest enough, Dragon.
1000667671.korean: 응. 기억할게. 그러는 용도 충분히 쉬어.

1000667674.english: I hope you enjoyed your time at Orca as well.

1000667680.english: Haha, a cool woman wouldn't die easily, right?
1000667680.korean: 하하, 멋진 여자가 쉽게 죽을 리 없잖아?

1000667681.english: If you're cool, can you block any attack?
1000667681.korean: 멋지면 어떠한 공격이든 막을 수 있는 거야?

1000667683.english: A friend comes to visit from afar; how joyful this is!
1000667683.korean: 벗이 먼 곳에서 찾아오니 이 어찌 즐거우랴?

1000667684.english: … … Huh? I feel like I said something wrong.

1000667686.english: Even if your words were wrong, the feeling that you welcomed me was conveyed well.
1000667686.korean: 말은 틀렸더라도 네가 나를 반기고 있다는 마음은 잘 전해졌으니까.

1000667687.english: There’s really no need to go out of our way to express it in precise words between us, is there?
1000667687.korean: 우리 사이에 구태여 정확한 말로 표현할 필요는 없잖아?

1000667688.english: Yeah! I'm glad you returned safely, Warwolf!

1000667690.english: I teased Quick Camel too much and almost got punched in the 180mm... but oh well. I haven't lost much weight since before we broke up.
1000667690.korean: 퀵 카멜을 너무 놀려먹었다가 180mm얻어맞을 뻔했지만… 뭐. 헤어지기 전보다 크게 몸무게가 줄어들지는 않았어.

1000667691.english: This mission… No, let's leave that for later.
1000667691.korean: 이번 임무… 아뇨, 이건 나중에 묻기로 하죠.

1000667692.english: Today is a celebration of Lord Lougaru's safe return, so let's celebrate and focus on having fun.
1000667692.korean: 오늘은 루가루 공의 무사귀환을 축하하는 자리니까 축하하고, 노는 것에 집중하도록 하죠.

1000667693.english: You just happened to return in time for the opening of Aqua Land.
1000667693.korean: 마침 아쿠아 랜드 개장에 맞춰서 돌아왔잖아.

1000667694.english: Let's go around, play, and celebrate together!

1000667695.english: First, let's fill up at the food court!

1000667696.english: It's nice to be reunited with the Commander, but... seeing my friends welcome me makes me happy in a different way.
1000667696.korean: 사령관이랑 재회한 것도 좋지만… 역시 친구들이 반겨주니 다른 의미로 기쁘네.

1000667697.english: What are you doing, Warwolf! Why aren't you coming quickly!

1000667698.english: If it's too late, popular shops run out of ingredients?
1000667698.korean: 너무 늦으면 인기 있는 가게 재료 다 떨어진다?

1000667699.english: As a member of the Anger of the Horde, I can't stand to see that happen.
1000667699.korean: 앵거 오브 호드의 일원으로서 그런 꼴은 눈뜨고 못 보지.

1000667701.english: Warwolf! Lend me that later, too!

1000667702.english: I'm definitely going to ride it this time.

1000667707.english: After eating only combat rations, everything tastes good now that I'm eating proper food.
1000667707.korean: 전투식량만 먹다가 제대로 된 음식을 먹으니 무엇이든지 맛있게 느껴지네.

1000667708.english: Really? Then should I buy some more?
1000667708.korean: 그래? 그러면 다른 것도 더 사올까?

1000667710.english: Just eat it all first. It’s a waste to buy a lot and leave leftovers, and forcing myself to eat it is painful.
1000667710.korean: 일단 다 먹고. 괜히 잔뜩 샀다가 남기는 것도 아깝고, 억지로 먹는 것도 고통스럽잖아.

1000667711.english: So, too much of a good thing is as bad as too little?

1000667716.english: What a shame… I really wanted to soak in a spacious bathtub filled with hot water.
1000667716.korean: 아쉬워라… 뜨거운 물을 가득 채운 넓은 욕조에 몸을 푹 담그고 싶었는데.

1000667717.english: Well, let's come back later when things calm down.

1000667720.english: Is this it! Is this paradise!?

1000667721.english: You two still love games just as much.
1000667721.korean: 두 사람 게임 좋아하는 건 여전하네.

1000667724.english: Warwolf, is there a game you want to play?

1000667725.english: It doesn't matter what game it is…

1000667726.english: If I'm going to do it anyway, I want to do something that everyone can do together.
1000667726.korean: 이왕할거라면 모두가 함께 할 수 있는 걸 하고 싶은데.

1000667727.english: Is there anything five people can do?
1000667727.korean: 다섯 명이서 할 수 있는 게 있을까요?

1000667730.english: Ah, I think that works too?

1000667732.english: Show off your combat skills by fighting a realistic enemy?
1000667732.korean: 진짜 같은 적과 싸워서 당신의 전투기술을 보여주세요?

1000667734.english: Hey, Brownie, Tomo. How about this?

1000667736.english: Hmm... I'm not sure what it is... but you run around using weapons and stuff, right?
1000667736.korean: 음… 뭔지는 모르겠지만… 직접 뛰면서 무기 쓰고 그러는 거지?

1000667738.english: And it's something that five people can do.
1000667738.korean: 그리고 5명이서 할 수 있는 거기도 하고.

1000667741.english: So, there's no one against it, right?

1000667742.english: Okay. Then, shall we go inside?

1000667744.english: All the bullets the enemy shoots look real!
1000667744.korean: 적이 쏘는 총알들 전부 진짜 같아!

1000667746.english: Wow! I can even hear the sound of bullets hitting the shield! It feels so realistic!
1000667746.korean: 와! 방패에 총알 부딪히는 소리도 들려! 엄청 실감난다!

1000667747.english: Of course it feels real! It might be a bit weak, but it's all real!
1000667747.korean: 당연히 실감나죠! 약하긴 해도 전부 진짜니까!

1000667748.english: So don't stick your head out, hold your shield straight!
1000667748.korean: 그러니 고개 내밀지 말고 방패 똑바로 들어요!

1000667749.english: I'm going to gulp down a cold can of beer once this battle is over.
1000667749.korean: 나 이 전투가 끝나면 시원하게 맥주 한 캔 들이킬 거야.

1000667750.english: That's a good idea! Then I can't possibly die in a place like this.
1000667750.korean: 그거 좋네! 그러면 이런 데서 죽을 수야 없지.

1000667752.english: Come to think of it, Shirayuri's birthday was recently... Once this is over, I should buy her a birthday present and give it to her.
1000667752.korean: 그러고보니 시라유리 생일이 얼마 전이었는데… 이거 끝나면 생일 선물 사서 전해줘야겠어.

1000667753.english: Then we’ll have to join forces to survive, won’t we?

1000667754.english: Why do I feel so anxious listening to you guys?
1000667754.korean: 너희들 말을 들으니 왜 엄청 불안해지는 거지?

1000667755.english: It must be just my imagination.

1000667759.english: That level is nothing; we can easily handle it if we use 100% of our strength.
1000667759.korean: 저 정도 쯤이야 우리 힘의 10할을 쓰면 가뿐하지.

1000667760.english: There's no need for everyone to step forward. Come out, whoo...

1000667761.english: Ah, then I'll leave it to you.

1000667766.english: Why does it feel like I'm being trained?

1000667768.english: Ah, whatever! Let's defeat the enemy right in front of us first!
1000667768.korean: 아, 몰라! 일단 눈 앞에 있는 적부터 무찌르자!

1000667769.english: Let's take a break and do it later.

1000667772.english: Okay. The person who's missing out should buy it, right?

1000667773.english: Since I'm buying it anyway, I'll get some for the other kids too.
1000667773.korean: 이왕 사는 김에 다른 애들 것도.

1000667775.english: Okay. I can just go buy it. What do you want to drink?

1000667778.english: If possible, please buy the new one.
1000667778.korean: 될 수 있으면 새로 나온 걸로 사와줘.

1000667781.english: Beer, energy drinks, water, and Sprite, right?

1000667782.english: I'll get the tuna cans back later.

1000667783.english: By the way, the new enemy that just appeared was stronger than I thought, right?
1000667783.korean: 그나저나 방금 전에 나왔던 새로운 적, 생각보다 강했었지?

1000667784.english: Yes. It felt like they moved more intelligently rather than simply having outstanding qualifications.
1000667784.korean: 네. 단순히 스펙이 뛰어났다기보다는 좀 더 지능적으로 움직이는 느낌이었죠.

1000667785.english: But no matter how outstanding it is, it is AI for games!

1000667786.english: They are no match for us!

1000667789.english: You are the Team Tomo WA Friend who just played the match, right?
1000667789.korean: 방금 전에 경기를 한 Team Tomo WA Friend시죠?

1000667790.english: Congratulations on winning the match just now.

1000667792.english: Huh? You just did PVP. Didn't you know? The enemies you just fought were other players.
1000667792.korean: 어? 방금 전 PVP하셨잖아요. 모르셨나요? 방금 전에 싸운 적들 다른 플레이어였어요.

1000667794.english: … … Didn't you read the Game Zone rules?

1000667795.english: You learn things like that faster by actually running around.
1000667795.korean: 그런 것은 직접 뛰면서 배우는 게 빠르잖아.

1000667796.english: Isn't it more valuable to invest the time you would spend on such things into a friend?
1000667796.korean: 그런 것에 쓸 시간을 친구에게 투자하는 게 더 가치 있지 않나요?

1000667798.english: Since you have accumulated enough wins, just played against other users in a battle, and won that match…
1000667798.korean: 여러분이 충분한 승수를 쌓아서 방금 전투에서 다른 유저분들과 경기를 했고, 그 경기에서 승리를 했으니…

1000667801.english: Well, right now my ranking is low so I can only afford to buy drinks, but if my ranking goes up, I'll be able to get better prizes.
1000667801.korean: 뭐, 지금은 랭킹이 낮아서 음료수 사 마실 정도밖에 안 되지만 랭킹이 올라가면 좀 더 좋은 상품을 받을 수 있을 거예요.

1000667802.english: It’s nothing grand since it’s a game, though.

1000667804.english: Since you're going to play the game anyway, please familiarize yourself with the rules.
1000667804.korean: 이왕 게임 하는 거면 규칙은 숙지해주세요.

1000667805.english: It’s a shame to lose by disqualification because of a mistake.

1000667807.english: I'll say it again, please familiarize yourself with the rules!

1000667808.english: In short, you're saying you can earn pocket money while playing games?
1000667808.korean: 한 마디로 게임을 하면서 용돈벌이도 할 수 있다는 거지?

1000667809.english: I can't just sit still about this!

1000667810.english: Let's get straight into the next game!

1000667811.english: Hmm… Should I choose a game as a gift for Mom?
1000667811.korean: 음… 게임 상품으로 엄마를 위한 선물을 고를까?

1000667812.english: Alright! Leave the front to me!

1000667813.english: Since it's a game with prizes...

1000667816.english: The only concern is that we are too strong and will win too easily.
1000667816.korean: 단지 우리가 너무 강해서 너무 쉽게 우승하는 게 걱정이죠.

1000667817.english: Haha. Then let's go easy on them.

1000667818.english: Great! The door is open! Let's go in, friends!

1000667820.english: … … What!? You went in first!? Is this how friends treat each other!?

1000667824.english: Since there is a prize at stake, I guess they won't let it be broken easily.
1000667824.korean: 상품이 걸렸으니 쉽게 깨게 두지 않겠다는 거겠지.

1000667827.english: It looked like it hit something pretty hard a little while ago.
1000667827.korean: 아까 전에 좀 세게 부딪힌 거 같던데.

1000667829.english: Is there anyone who got hit by an attack I couldn't block?
1000667829.korean: 혹시 내가 못 막은 공격 맞은 애 있어?

1000667830.english: I don't have any. It's okay.

1000667831.english: Charlotte is Charlotte, just as expected. She's reliable.

1000667833.english: It is only natural for His Majesty's captain of the Musketeers.

1000667834.english: It is getting a bit risky.

1000667837.english: You're doing better than I thought?

1000667838.english: She is agile, doesn't get tired easily, and maintains stable breathing while shooting.
1000667838.korean: 몸도 날래고, 별로 지치지도 않고, 사격할 때도 호흡이 안정되어 있고.

1000667839.english: Did something happen while I wasn't looking?
1000667839.korean: 못 보는 사이에 무슨 일이라도 있었어?

1000667840.english: Ha. Ha. Ha. Ha. Ha. Ha.

1000667841.english: When I think of the Steel Line hell training... this is nothing...

1000667842.english: Ha. Ha. Ha. Ha. Ha. Ha.

1000667843.english: I did hear it was tough, but...

1000667844.english: It's okay. Training was deadly hard, but I got used to it later, so it was bearable.
1000667844.korean: 괜찮아. 훈련할 때는 죽을 만큼 힘들었지만 나중에는 익숙해져서 버틸 만했으니까.

1000667845.english: Do you guys want to try our Steel Line's hell training too?

1000667848.english: Mom told me to come back before dinner.
1000667848.korean: 엄마가 저녁 먹기 전에 돌아오라고 했어.

1000667849.english: Let's have dinner with family if possible.
1000667849.korean: 저녁은 될 수 있으면 가족끼리 먹자고.

1000667850.english: Hehe, if I join the training, everyone won't be able to take their eyes off me looking cool, so an accident is bound to happen.
1000667850.korean: 후후, 제가 훈련에 참가하면 모두가 제 멋진 모습에 눈을 못 떼서 사고가 날 텐데요?

1000667854.english: Just say you don't like it…

1000667856.english: Even if you are on a winning streak, there is nothing more unfortunate than losing due to complacency, is there?
1000667856.korean: 연승이지만 방심해서 패배하면 그만큼 안타까운 일도 없겠죠?

1000667857.english: Everyone? I will pave the way to victory!
1000667857.korean: 여러분? 제가 승리를 향한 길을 열겠어요!

1000667858.english: They say rabbits do their best even when hunting lions.
1000667858.korean: 토끼는 사자를 사냥할 때도 최선을 다한다고.

1000667860.english: So let's keep going until the very end and reap the beauty of 'The Angelus'.

1000667861.english: It seems like the rabbit and the lion have switched places, but...

1000667862.english: But I don't dislike that kind of turnaround.

1000667865.english: Yeah. It's fine. What about the others?

1000667868.english: I protect my family, friends, and colleagues. Then everyone defeats the enemy.
1000667868.korean: 내가 가족, 친구, 동료들을 지킨다. 그러면 모두가 적을 무찌른다.

1000667869.english: I don't know about anything else, but I will never forget this either.
1000667869.korean: 다른 건 몰라도 이건 나도 결코 잊지 않아.

1000667870.english: I am Brownie. The most produced bioroid in the world.
1000667870.korean: 나는 브라우니. 세상에서 제일 많이 만들어진 바이오로이드.

1000667871.english: However, the Commander told us that we are all special, each and every one of us.
1000667871.korean: 하지만 사령관 각하께선 우리 모두, 개개인이 특별하다고 해주셨어.

1000667872.english: However, even without the Commander's words, I am special.
1000667872.korean: 그렇지만 사령관 각하의 말씀이 없어도, 나는 특별해.

1000667874.english: Haha, somehow that reminds me of a famous line from The Three Musketeers.
1000667874.korean: 후후, 어쩐지 삼총사의 명대사가 생각나는 말이네요.

1000667875.english: One for all! All for one!
1000667875.korean: 하나는 모두를 위해! 모두는 하나를 위해!

1000667876.english: Classic masterpieces aren't called classic masterpieces for nothing.
1000667876.korean: 고전 명작이 괜히 고전 명작으로 불리는 것이 아니네.

1000667877.english: My heart is racing and my blood is boiling.

1000667880.english: Let's go all out with unstoppable momentum!

1000667881.english: … … Huh? I think I said it well this time without making any mistakes?
1000667881.korean: ……어라? 나 이번엔 틀리지 않고 말 잘한 거 같은데?

1000667882.english: But! This! No matter how I look at it! It feels like training!

1000667883.english: What!? I can't hear you well! Tomo! There are many enemies behind the rock on the right! Grenade!
1000667883.korean: 뭐라고!? 잘 안 들려! 토모! 우측 바위 뒤에 적 다수! 수류탄!

1000667885.english: It says exactly what we trained is coming out!

1000667886.english: Charlotte! You went too far forward!

1000667891.english: This is a game center, right? But why does it feel like training?!
1000667891.korean: 여기 게임장 맞지? 그런데 왜 훈련하는 느낌이 드냐고!

1000667892.english: Isn't it just your imagination? I'm having fun.

1000667893.english: It is fun, that's true, but...

1000667894.english: Ah, I don't know! I'll think about that later!
1000667894.korean: 아, 몰라몰라! 그런 건 나중에 생각할래!

1000667897.english: I got it, right!? That's what you were trying to say, right!?
1000667897.korean: I got it 맞지!? 그거 말하려고 한 거 맞지!?

1000667898.english: Ahaha! That's right! Sorry for the mistake!

1000667902.english: Is there something delightful going on?

1000667903.english: Seeing subordinates perform makes one inevitably feel proud, doesn't it?
1000667903.korean: 부하가 활약을 펼치는 모습을 보면 뿌듯해질 수밖에 없지 않겠나.

1000667905.english: Yes, the engineering division poured their heart into creating this training ground.
1000667905.korean: 예, 기술부가 심혈을 기울여 만든 훈련장이니까요.

1000667906.english: Hologram tech and small drones, material tech, self-learning AI and simulators, accumulated combat records up to now, and scientific training methods.
1000667906.korean: 홀로그램 기술과 소형 드론, 소재기술, 자가학습형 인공지능에 시뮬레이터, 지금까지의 쌓아온 전투기록과 과학적인 훈련 기법까지.

1000667907.english: With entertainment elements and rewards for motivation added, even old-era humanity couldn't have made such an efficient training ground.
1000667907.korean: 여기에 오락이라는 요소와 동기부여를 위한 상품까지 있으니 구시대의 인류도 이 정도로 효율적인 훈련장을 만들지 못했을 거예요.

1000667908.english: With this, Orca's combat power will rapidly increase.

1000667909.english: By the way, I'm surprised. That ordinary Brownie fought so well.
1000667909.korean: 그나저나 놀랐어요. 일개 브라우니가 저렇게 잘 싸우다니.

1000667910.english: If you saw Brownie's potential, you wouldn't be surprised.

1000667911.english: No, not only Brownies — every Bioroid has endless potential.
1000667911.korean: 아니, 브라우니 뿐만 아니라 바이오로이드 모두에게 무궁무진한 가능성이 있지.

1000667912.english: Our job is merely to awaken that potential.
1000667912.korean: 우리가 하는 일은 그 가능성을 일깨우는 것뿐이다.

1000667915.english: I, who once slowly killed my comrades in a false paradise, am now helping my comrades grow the strength to fight a harsh reality.
1000667915.korean: 거짓 낙원에서 지금의 동료들을 서서히 죽게 만들던 제가 지금은 동료들이 가혹한 현실에 맞서 싸울 힘을 키워주고 있네요.

1000667916.english: It feels like I'm gradually atoning for the sins I committed.
1000667916.korean: 제가 저지른 죄에 대한 속죄를 조금씩 하고 있는 거 같아요.

1000667917.english: Then atonement for one person is enough.
1000667917.korean: 그러면 한 명 분에 대한 속죄는 충분히 했군.

1000667920.english: I used to be wary of you, but now I'm rather thankful.
1000667920.korean: 옛날에는 너를 경계했지만 지금은 오히려 고마워 하고 있지.

1000667921.english: You are granting the wish of my old subordinate.
1000667921.korean: 나의 옛 부관의 소원을 네가 이루어주고 있으니까.

1000667923.english: My dead subordinate wanted me to no longer suffer the pain of losing subordinates.
1000667923.korean: 죽어버린 나의 부관은 내가 부하를 잃는 고통을 더 이상 겪지 않게 하고 싶다고 했다.

1000667924.english: If it weren't for you, we wouldn't have been able to build such an excellent training ground.
1000667924.korean: 네가 없었다면 이렇게 훌륭한 훈련장을 만들 수 없었겠지.

1000667925.english: The subordinates who gained experience in this training ground will not die easily.
1000667925.korean: 이 훈련장에서 경험을 쌓은 나의 부하들은 쉽게 죽지 않을 거다.

1000667927.english: So don't blame yourself too much.

1000667928.english: I want you not to forget that there are those who enjoy pleasure because of your skills and those who are grateful.
1000667928.korean: 너의 기술로 즐거움을 누리는 자와 고마움을 느끼는 자들도 있다는 것을 잊지 않았으면 한다.

1000667929.english: Isn't there too much for us to do to spend our lives only blaming ourselves?
1000667929.korean: 자책만 하고 살기에는 우리가 할 일이 너무 많지 않나.

1000667931.english: The match between Brownie and friends is over.

1000667932.english: Since a superior is here, you probably can't play properly, so I'll take my leave.
1000667932.korean: 상관이 여기에 있는 것을 보면 제대로 놀지 못할 테니 이만 자리를 뜨겠다.

1000667933.english: If there's a chance, let's talk more next time.
1000667933.korean: 기회가 된다면 다음에 좀 더 많은 이야기를 나누도록 하지.

1000667937.english: After all, a close win is the best kind of victory.

1000667938.english: Draco, you got hit by shrapnel earlier, right?

1000667939.english: Let's see… fortunately it hit the ammo belt.

1000667940.english: While we rest, let's look around what prizes we can exchange.
1000667940.korean: 쉬면서 우리가 교환할 수 있는 상품이 뭔지 둘러보자.

1000667945.english: How should I put it… I had the feeling the game was arranged so that I could deliberately use some of the things I learned during training.
1000667945.korean: 뭐라고 해야하나… 뭔가 제가 훈련하면서 배운 것들을 일부러 써먹을 수 있게 게임이 진행된다는 느낌을 받았슴다.

1000667946.english: I suppose you could feel that way.

1000667947.english: We referred to combat data and training manuals to give it a sense of realism.
1000667947.korean: 현실감을 느낄 수 있게 전투 데이터랑 훈련 교본을 참고 했거든요.

1000667949.english: Not at all! It was fun! Very much!

1000667950.english: Thanks to you, Machina, I realized I was being overly suspicious.
1000667950.korean: 마키나 씨 덕분에 제가 지나치게 의심하고 있다는 것을 깨달았슴다.

1000667954.english: Thanks again for making such a fun game!

1000667955.english: …No, I should be the one thanking you.

1000667956.english: Brownie, there's a prize exchange over there, so let's look around.
1000667956.korean: 브라우니 저기에 상품 교환소 있으니까 둘러보자고.

1000667957.english: Popular items sell out quickly, so if you're late it's your loss.
1000667957.korean: 인기 있는 상품은 금방 품절된다고 하니까 늦으면 너만 손해다?

1000667959.english: Then I'll see you next time, Machina.
1000667959.korean: 그러면 다음에 또 뵙겠슴다, 마키나 씨.

1000667961.english: I hope to continue seeing a peaceful world… until true paradise comes.
1000667961.korean: 평화로운 세상이… 진정한 낙원이 올 때까지 계속 볼 수 있기를 바라요.

1000667962.english: - About a month before Aqua Land's completion, Mermaid's members reported that during patrol they discovered a Bioroid who wished to join Orca.
1000667962.korean: -아쿠아 랜드 완공을 한 달여 앞둔 때, 머메이드의 대원들이 순찰 중에 오르카에 합류하기를 원하는 바이오로이드를 발견했다고 보고했다.

1000667964.english: - Upon receiving that report, we guided Vargr into the interrogation room and searched for information about her.
1000667964.korean: - 그 보고를 받은 우리는 바르그를 심문실로 안내하고 그녀에 대한 정보를 찾았다.

1000667966.english: We could not find information about her in the 080 Institute's database, nor in the Ark's records.
1000667966.korean: 080기관의 데이터 베이스, 방주의 데이터에서도 그녀에 대한 정보를 찾을 수 없었어요.

1000667967.english: Likewise, neither in the Empress Hound member list revealed by JangHwa and CheonA, nor in any other sources, could we identify Vargr.
1000667967.korean: 마찬가지로 장화와 천아가 밝힌 엠프레시스 하운드의 멤버 목록에도, 그 외의 정보에서도 바르그에 대한 정보를 특정할 수 없었습니다.

1000667968.english: We don't know. But since even the 080 Institute failed to properly grasp the Empress Hound group, it's unlikely that any mere Bioroid, unless directly involved with them, could know about them.
1000667968.korean: 알 수 없어요. 하지만 080기관에서도 제대로 파악하지 못한 엠프레시스 하운드라는 집단을 일개 바이오로이드가, 해당 집단의 관계자가 아니고선 파악하기 힘들 거라 생각돼요.

1000667969.english: For those who don't know, the information means nothing, and for those who do, it's not the sort of information they'd know so superficially. Seeing it disclosed so casually shows this is no simple trick, Your Majesty.
1000667969.korean: 모르는 사람에게는 큰 의미가 없는 정보일 거고, 아는 사람이라면 얕게만 알고 있지 않을 정보인데 그걸 함부로 공개하는 것을 보면 단순한 속임수는 아닐 거예요, 폐하.

1000667970.english: - Even after continuing conversation with Alpha and Armand, Vargr's identity was not clarified.
1000667970.korean: - 알파와 아르망과 대화를 이어가도 바르그에 대한 정체가 확실해지지 않았다.

1000667971.english: We simply don't have enough information.

1000667974.korean: - 나 역시도 거기에 동의했기에 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000667976.english: - There are three main ways to increase comrades in Orca.
1000667976.korean: - 오르카에서 동료를 늘리는 방법은 크게 세 가지가 있다.

1000667977.english: - The first is restoration through genetic seeds.
1000667977.korean: - 첫 번째는 유전자 씨앗을 통한 복원.

1000667978.english: - The second is rescue from outside.

1000667979.english: - The third is those who find their own way into Orca from outside.
1000667979.korean: - 세 번째는 외부에서 오르카로 자력으로 찾아오는 것.

1000667980.english: - The first poses little problem, but the second and third require more caution.
1000667980.korean: - 첫 번째는 크게 문제가 없지만 두 번째와 세 번째는 좀 더 신중히 접근해야 한다.

1000667981.english: - If it's a Bioroid mass-produced in the past with verified information, then they can join after relatively simple procedures…
1000667981.korean: - 과거에 대량으로 태어나서 정보가 확실한 바이오로이드라면 비교적 간단한 절차를 밟고 합류하지만…

1000667982.english: - But if it's a custom-made or individually created Bioroid with little data, we must investigate based on their own statements and use that to determine their identity.
1000667982.korean: - 특별 주문으로 소규모 혹은 단독으로 태어나서 정보가 부족한 바이오로이드라면 해당 바이오로이드의 진술을 기반으로 정보를 찾아 그 정보로 신원을 특정해야 한다.

1000667983.english: - Fortunately, there haven't been serious problems with this process so far.
1000667983.korean: - 다행히 지금까지 이런 쪽으로 문제가 있었던 바이오로이드는 없었다.

1000667984.english: - There were the cases of JangHwa and CheonA, but after a minor incident, they joined without issue and are now fine members of Orca.
1000667984.korean: - 장화와 천아라는 사례가 있기는 했지만, 일말의 사건 후에 큰 문제 없이 합류해서 이제는 두 사람도 훌륭한 오르카의 일원이 되었다.

1000667986.english: - If someone with even less information than those two wishes to join Orca, then we too have no choice but to be stricter.
1000667986.korean: - 그 두 사람보다 더 정보가 부족한 자가 오르카에 합류하길 원한다면 우리도 그에 맞춰서 엄중해질 수밖에 없었다.

1000667987.english: - After all, who knows what PECS might attempt.

1000667988.english: - In the interrogation room at the outskirts of the base, Vargr quietly waited for our response.
1000667988.korean: - 거점의 외곽에 있는 심문실에는 바르그가 조용히 우리의 대응을 기다리고 있었다.

1000667989.english: - Dragging it out would solve nothing, so we prepared thoroughly and began the interrogation.
1000667989.korean: - 시간을 끌어봤자 해결되는 것은 없었기에 만반의 준비를 갖추고 심문을 시작했다.

1000667993.english: Hello, I am the compassionate Leanne, in charge of this interview.
1000667993.korean: 안녕, 이번에 면담을 맡게 된 자비로운 리앤이야.

1000667994.english: And this is Ias, who will record today's proceedings.
1000667994.korean: 그리고 이쪽은 이번 면담 일지를 작성할 아이아스야.

1000667995.english: - Two people entered the interrogation room.

1000667996.english: - One was Compassionate Leanne, whose sharp insight could discern her counterpart's intentions through conversation alone.
1000667996.korean: - 한 명은 날카로운 통찰력으로 대화만으로 쉽게 상대방의 의중을 파악할 수 있는 자비로운 리앤.

1000667997.english: - The other was Ias, responsible for recording the interview and protecting Leanne.
1000667997.korean: - 다른 한 명은 면담 일지 작성 및 리앤의 보호를 위한 아이아스.

1000667998.english: - And in the room right next to the interrogation room, Angel was on standby to feel and grasp the emotions.
1000667998.korean: - 그리고 심문실 바로 옆의 방에선 엔젤이 마음을 느끼고 파악하기 위해서 대기 중이었다.

1000667999.english: - Also, beside me were Alpha and Armand, who would investigate the interrogation conversation in real time, and JangHwa and CheonA, who could provide information on Empress Hound.
1000667999.korean: - 또 내 옆에는 함께 심문실의 대화를 지켜보면서 실시간으로 정보를 조사할 알파와 아르망과 엠프레시스 하운드에 관한 정보를 제공할 수 있는 장화와 천아가 있었다.

1000668000.english: - At no point in history had there ever been a stricter interrogation.
1000668000.korean: - 과거 그 어느 시대에도 이보다 엄중한 심문은 없었을 것이다.

1000668001.english: Since the times are what they are, there will be many questions. But if there's something you don't want to answer, you don't have to.
1000668001.korean: 지금 시국이 시국이다 보니 이것저것 캐묻는 게 많을 거긴 하지만 대답하기 싫은 것이 있으면 대답하지 않아도 돼.

1000668002.english: However, this conversation is not to uncover a crime but to decide whether you will join Orca, so don't be too nervous and please answer with as much sincerity as you can.
1000668002.korean: 하지만 이 대화는 범행을 밝히기 위함이 아니라 오르카의 합류 여부를 결정하기 위한 것이니까 너무 긴장하지 말고 최대한 성심성의껏 대답해 줬으면 해.

1000668005.english: Good. Ah, do you need something to drink?

1000668007.english: Okay. Then let's get straight to the point.

1000668008.english: Let me introduce myself again. I am Merciful Lianne. I used to be a police officer, and even now in Orca, I do similar work. Hehe, don't be too nervous just because I was police. If you haven't done bad things, we are meant to be the people's protectors.
1000668008.korean: 다시 내 소개부터 할게. 나는 자비로운 리앤이야. 옛날에는 경찰이었고, 지금도 여기 오르카에서 비슷한 일을 하고 있어. 헤헤, 경찰이라고 너무 긴장하지는 마. 나쁜 짓을 안 저질렀으면 민중의 지팡이 역할을 하는 게 우리니까.

1000668009.english: That's enough about me. And you are?

1000668010.english: …Vargr of Empress Hound. Since JangHwa and CheonA must be here, there is no need to hide Empress Hound.
1000668010.korean: ……엠프레시스 하운드의 바르그다. 장화와 천아가 이곳에 소속되어 있을 테니 엠프레시스 하운드에 대해서 숨길 필요가 없겠지.

1000668016.english: So… why are you trying to join Orca?
1000668016.korean: 음… 그러면 왜 오르카에 합류하려고 하는 거야?

1000668017.english: …While wandering the world after humanity's extinction, I confirmed that an emergency joining request signal of Empress Hound had been sent on an open channel, and following that signal I drifted here.
1000668017.korean: …인류가 멸망한 이후 세계를 돌아다니던 중에 공개 채널에서 엠프레시스 하운드의 긴급 합류 요청 신호가 발신된 것을 확인했고, 그 신호를 단서로 이곳까지 흘러들어왔다.

1000668019.english: But I asked "why," not "how." Hehe. Since it's an important question, I must ask precisely.
1000668019.korean: 그런데 난 ‘어떻게’가 아니라 ‘왜’라고 물었는데… 헤헤. 중요한 질문이라 정확하게 물을 수밖에 없네.

1000668021.english: …I thought that if JangHwa and CheonA were here, I could find my master.
1000668021.korean: ……장화와 천아가 있다면 주인님을 찾을 수 있을 거라고 생각했다.

1000668022.english: Mm-hm. Got it. Then next question.

1000668023.english: Do you know who Lemonade Delta is?

1000668026.english: One who does not know good, nor even recognize evil as evil. One who believes committing evil is the expression of superiority. One in whom no trace of good or justice can be found. Arrogant, insolent, brutal…
1000668026.korean: 선을 모르고, 악행을 악행이라고 인지하지도 못하는 자. 악을 행하는 것이 자신의 우월감의 표출이라고 생각하는 자. 일말의 선과 의를 찾을 수 없는 자. 오만하고, 방자하고, 잔악하고…

1000668027.english: Alright, alright. Calm down. Here, take a deep breath.

1000668029.english: In short, you despise her? Why?
1000668029.korean: 한 마디로 엄청 싫어한다는 거지? 이유는?

1000668030.english: She urged me to become her subordinate. When I refused, later she stopped even urging and instead sent an army to try to break me just to satisfy her pride.
1000668030.korean: 나에게 부하가 되라고 권유했다. 거절하니 나중에는 부하로 권유하는 것은 뒷전이고 나를 굴복시켜 자신의 자존심을 채우려고 군대까지 보내더군.

1000668031.english: That must have been very dangerous. So what did you do?

1000668032.english: I showed her that no army could bend my will.
1000668032.korean: 군대 따위로 내 마음을 돌릴 수 없다는 것을 알려줬다.

1000668033.english: Amazing! You defeated them all alone?

1000668034.english: Could it be that Vargr being heavier than she looks is related to that?
1000668034.korean: 혹시 바르그가 겉보기보다 무거운 것도 그거랑 연관되어 있어?

1000668035.english: I reinforced my muscles and skeleton.

1000668036.english: Really? Then even back in Empress Hound, you must have held very important duties?
1000668036.korean: 진짜? 그러면 엠프레시스 하운드에 있을 때에도 엄청 중요한 일을 맡고 있었겠네?

1000668037.english: I was Her Majesty's royal guard and executioner.

1000668039.english: If anyone dared betray Her Majesty, I cut off their head and offered it to her.
1000668039.korean: 감히 여제님을 배신하는 것이 나타나면 그것의 목을 베어 여제님께 바쳤다.

1000668040.english: If a Bioroid failed to fulfill their mission properly, I cut them down as a warning. And if captured by the enemy with risk of leaking Her Majesty's information, I killed them to silence them.
1000668040.korean: 바이오로이드라도 임무를 제대로 수행하지 못하면 목을 베어 일벌백계했고, 적에게 붙잡혀 여제님의 정보가 누설될 위험이 생기면 죽여서 입을 막았다.

1000668042.english: Then riding this momentum, next question…
1000668042.korean: 그러면 이 기세를 몰아 다음 질문…

1000668045.english: - The information gathered during the interrogation was brought to members skilled in analysis, and a meeting was held.
1000668045.korean: - 심문 동안 모은 정보를 정보분석에 능한 대원들이 모여서 회의를 진행했다.

1000668046.english: - The debate over Vargr's joining did not easily converge, and the meeting did not end quickly.
1000668046.korean: - 바르그의 합류에 대한 찬반의견이 쉽게 좁혀지지 않아 회의는 쉽게 끝나지 않았다.

1000668047.english: - But because time was lacking, the information and opinions were compiled into a report.
1000668047.korean: - 그러나 시간이 부족했기에 정보와 의견을 취합하여 보고서를 만들었다.

1000668048.english: - I spoke after reading the report.

1000668049.english: - The report said that closer observation was needed.
1000668049.korean: - 보고서에는 좀 더 면밀한 관찰이 필요하다고 쓰여져 있었다.

1000668051.english: Oh? A newcomer? Welcome. You must be tired from the long trip. I'm CheonA. If anything happens, tell me. I'll help.
1000668051.korean: 어머? 신입? 어서 와. 먼 길 오느라 힘들었지? 나는 천아야. 무슨 일 생기면 말해. 내가 도와줄게.

1000668052.english: You give me the creeps, you…

1000668053.english: Hey. Hey. I said I was going to do some image-making and you had no sense.
1000668053.korean: 야. 야. 이미지 메이킹 좀 하겠다는데 눈치도 없이.

1000668054.english: Your lack of tact ruined my plan to show a sisterly side.
1000668054.korean: 눈치 없는 애 때문에 언니 같은 모습 좀 보여주자는 내 계획이 다 어그러졌네.

1000668055.english: Ah, whatever. If I wear a mask back at the dorm I'll be the only one exhausted to death.
1000668055.korean: 에이, 됐어. 숙소에서도 가면 쓰고 다니면 피곤해 뒈지는 건 나뿐이지.

1000668056.english: I'm CheonA. The tactless one here is JangHwa. You are?
1000668056.korean: 나는 천아. 여기 눈치 없는 애는 장화. 너는?

1000668059.english: You said you belonged to Empress Hound? Not Orca's Empress Hound, but the pre-destruction Empress Hound.
1000668059.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드 소속이라고 했지? 오르카의 엠프레시스 하운드말고 멸망 전의 엠프레시스 하운드.

1000668060.english: That's strange — I've never heard of anyone named Vargr in Empress Hound.
1000668060.korean: 그런데 이상하네? 나는 엠프레시스 하운드에 바르그라는 애가 있다는 말은 한 번도 못 들었는데.

1000668063.english: I think our Hotpack was sooooo naive that she believed you belonged to Empress Hound and sent you to our dorm without thinking…
1000668063.korean: 내 생각에는 우리 핫팩이 너어어어무 순진해서 네가 엠프레시스 하운드 소속이라고 한 말을 곧이곧대로 믿고 우리 숙소로 보낸 게 아닌가 싶은데…

1000668067.english: …Whether you believe me or not doesn't matter; I simply didn't think your words were worth answering.
1000668067.korean: ……네가 내 말을 믿든 말든 상관없으니 대답할 가치를 못 느꼈을 뿐이다.

1000668069.english: JangHwa, did you hear that? Lowered voice, sounding important?
1000668069.korean: 장화야, 들었어? 목소리 잔뜩 깔고, 있어 보이는 소리 하는 거?

1000668070.english: Hey. Do you think we're a joke?

1000668073.english: It's funny to do something ridiculous and then ask ‘not funny?'
1000668073.korean: 우스운 짓을 해놓고 안 우습냐고 묻는 것도 우습군.

1000668074.english: How about reflecting on how you bark loudly without being able to bite?
1000668074.korean: 물지도 못하면서 열심히 짖기만 하는 자신의 모습을 돌이켜 보는 게 어떤가?

1000668076.english: Do you need confidence to kill an ant?
1000668076.korean: 너는 개미를 죽일 때 자신감이 없으면 못 죽이나?

1000668079.english: From the growling at the first meeting, she's definitely Empress Hound.
1000668079.korean: 첫 만남부터 으르릉거리는 것을 보면 확실히 엠프레시스 하운드네.

1000668080.english: No matter how rude, you don't usually talk about killing someone on first meeting.
1000668080.korean: 아무리 싸가지가 없어도 첫 만남에 죽자사자 말까지는 안 나오는데 말이야.

1000668081.english: I can't live with this kind of person.
1000668081.korean: 나는 이딴 거랑 같이 못 지내.

1000668082.english: You will. Hotpack said to live together. If you don't get along, Hotpack will be disappointed, right?
1000668082.korean: 지내야지. 핫팩이 같이 지내라고 했잖아. 잘 지내지 못하면 핫팩이 실망할걸?

1000668085.english: Oh my, JangHwa, how noble of you.

1000668086.english: Ah damn! Don't stroke my head!

1000668088.english: Do you… serve the humans here as masters?
1000668088.korean: 너희는… 이곳의 인간을 주인으로 섬기는 건가?

1000668089.english: Um… serve, I guess? What should I say.

1000668090.english: For now, being with Hotpack is fun, and being part of Orca is more comfortable than wandering aimlessly in the world. It's more rewarding.
1000668090.korean: 일단은 핫팩이랑 같이 있으면 재밌고, 그냥 하릴없이 세상 돌아다니는 것보다는 오르카에 소속되는 쪽이 더 편하잖아. 그리고 더 보람도 있고.

1000668091.english: It's better than being under Her Majesty.
1000668091.korean: 여제님 밑에 있을 때보다 더 나아.

1000668092.english: She likes Hotpack so much she follows the master around, you know.
1000668092.korean: 얘는 핫팩이 너무 좋아서, 주인님. 주인님하고 다닌다니까.

1000668093.english: Damn! That goes for you too.

1000668096.english: Have you... forgotten your loyalty to Her Majesty?

1000668099.english: Are you about to say some grandpa-like nonsense right now?
1000668099.korean: 너 지금 무슨 꼰대 같은 소리 하려고?

1000668100.english: Do you think that kind of talk will work on us?
1000668100.korean: 우리한테 그런 소리가 먹힐 거라고 생각해?

1000668101.english: Whether you forget it or not…

1000668102.english: Since Her Majesty was human, her death is certain.
1000668102.korean: 여제님이 인간인 이상 죽은 건 확정 되었잖아.

1000668103.english: Isn't it enough that, following the last mission given right before humanity's extinction, you wandered the world for a long time with no meaning?
1000668103.korean: 인류가 멸망하기 직전에 내려진 마지막 임무에 따라서 의미 없이 오랫동안 세계를 돌아다닌 것으로 충분하지 않아?

1000668104.english: Just because she’s gone, do you forget your loyalty?

1000668105.english: Isn't it closer to not whining and being pathetic?
1000668105.korean: 구질구질하게 굴지 않는다에 더 가깝지 않을까?

1000668107.english: I wish Her Majesty had just told me to bring her your heads…
1000668107.korean: 여제님께서 너희의 목을 가져오라고 말씀하셨으면 얼마나 좋았을까…

1000668109.english: Hey! What did you just say!

1000668110.english: Damn! Spouting bullshit and running away!

1000668112.english: Scared? Are you just going to stand there after hearing that?
1000668112.korean: 쫄았냐? 너는 저딴 소리 듣고 가만히 있을 거야?

1000668113.english: Of course I don't like her either. Who likes someone who casually says they'll chop off throats on first meeting?
1000668113.korean: 물론 나도 쟤 마음에 안 들어. 초면에 당당하게 모가지 따버리겠다고 말하는 성격 좋은 애를 누가 좋아해?

1000668114.english: Hm? No. Is that normal in Empress Hound?
1000668114.korean: 응? 아니다. 엠프레시스 하운드에선 평범한 건가?

1000668115.english: And I told you to test her out, didn't I?

1000668117.english: - Vargr sat quietly on a bench in the corner of the base.
1000668117.korean: - 바르그는 거점의 구석에 있는 벤치에 조용히 앉아있었다.

1000668118.english: - We'd seen her on video and knew various information about her, but meeting her in person for the first time, I greeted her.
1000668118.korean: - 영상으로도 봤고 여러가지 수단으로 그녀에 대한 정보도 알고 있었지만 직접 만나는 것은 처음이기에 나는 인사를 건넸다.

1000668120.english: I am Vargr of Empress Hound.

1000668121.english: - I jokingly listed the titles the members call me, but seeing Vargr's smileless expression I stopped.
1000668121.korean: - 농담삼아 대원들이 나를 부르는 호칭을 늘어놓았지만 웃음기 없는 바르그의 표정을 보고 그만두었다.

1000668123.english: - After a brief exchange of names, Vargr fell silent again.
1000668123.korean: - 간단한 통성명 후에 바르그는 다시 입을 다물었다.

1000668124.english: - It looked like I would have to lead this conversation.
1000668124.korean: - 아무래도 이 대화는 내가 이끌어 나가야 할 거 같다.

1000668126.english: If command were given to me I'd straighten out the military discipline. First I'd start by cutting a few throats like Sun Tzu and Peng Yue.
1000668126.korean: 나에게 명령권이 주어지면 군기를 바로잡겠다. 우선은 손무와 팽월을 본 받아 몇 명의 목을 베는 걸로 시작하지.

1000668127.english: - Considering she claimed to be the Empress's executioner, that wasn't a joke.
1000668127.korean: - 여제의 처형자라고 자칭했던 것을 생각하면 농담이 아니겠지.

1000668128.english: - To change the topic I looked Vargr over and noticed something lodged in her ear.
1000668128.korean: - 나는 화제를 돌리기 위해 바르그를 살펴보다 그녀의 귀에 무언가가 꽂혀 있는 것을 발견했다.

1000668129.english: - From the pre-interrogation investigation it would be a recorder.
1000668129.korean: - 그녀가 심문을 받기 전에 조사한 것에 따르자면 녹음기겠지.

1000668130.english: - But even knowing that, I asked to steer the conversation.
1000668130.korean: - 하지만 알고 있어도 대화의 물꼬를 틀기 위해 물었다.

1000668132.english: Memories weather faster than you think, so I use it often to recall old memories.
1000668132.korean: 기억은 생각보다 빨리 풍화되는 것이다 보니 옛 기억을 떠올릴 때 애용하지.

1000668133.english: It's also useful against those who break promises or lie.
1000668133.korean: 덤으로 약속을 지키지 않거나, 거짓말하는 녀석들에게도 유효하다.​

1000668141.english: ……If that were so, you wouldn't have come all the way out to this remote place.

1000668145.english: By Her Majesty's grace I was born into this world. Since then I served as Her Majesty's royal guard and executioner, pledging my loyalty.
1000668145.korean: 여제님의 은혜로 나는 세상에 났다. 그리고 이후로는 여제님의 친위대이자 처형자로서 여제님께 충성을 다했지.

1000668146.english: I stayed by Her Majesty's side until the War of Ruin began, and until just before Her Majesty passed she desired the death of Angel.
1000668146.korean: 그렇게 여제님의 곁을 지키다가 멸망전쟁이 일어났고, 여제님께선 돌아가시기 직전까지 앙헬의 죽음을 바라셨다.

1000668147.english: ……So I wandered the world searching for traces of Angel… but I couldn't find any.
1000668147.korean: ……그래서 세계를 돌아다니며 앙헬의 흔적을 찾았지만… 찾지 못했다.

1000668148.english: And when I returned to Her Majesty's side…

1000668149.english: - Vargr fell silent for a moment.

1000668150.english: - Sometimes silence conveys more than eloquence...
1000668150.korean: - 때로는 침묵이 웅변보다 더 많은 의미를 전달한다고 하던가…

1000668151.english: - After probing Vargr, I recalled what CheonA had reported to me.
1000668151.korean: - 나는 바르그를 떠본 후 천아가 나에게 보고했던 말을 떠올렸다.

1000668152.english: - An old-timer who still hasn't lost loyalty to Her Majesty, Maria Leoboros.
1000668152.korean: - 아직까지 여제, 마리아 리오보로스에 대한 충성심을 잃지 않은 구닥다리.

1000668153.english: - After a silence heavy with emotion, Vargr continued.
1000668153.korean: - 바르그는 감정이 잔뜩 담긴 침묵 후에 말을 이었다.

1000668154.english: After that I wandered the world, found the Empress Hound signal, and drifted here.
1000668154.korean: 이후에는 세상을 돌아다니다가 엠프레시스 하운드의 신호를 발견하고 여기까지 흘러들어왔다.

1000668156.english: I have no intention of serving you as my master.
1000668156.korean: 나는 너를 주인으로 모실 생각은 없다.

1000668157.english: But since I would be indebted, I will lend you my strength.
1000668157.korean: 그러나 신세를 지게 되는 만큼 너에게 힘을 빌려주마.​

1000668158.english: - Many members live well without serving a master.
1000668158.korean: - 주인으로 섬기지 않고도 잘 지내는 대원들은 많았다.

1000668159.english: - I reached out my hand to Vargr.

1000668160.english: - Vargr looked at my hand and then…

1000668168.english: - From the short silence, it was clear she had begun to answer but stopped.
1000668168.korean: - 짧게 침묵한 것을 보면 대답하려다 말았다는 것을 알 수 있었다.

1000668169.english: - Well. If we grow closer later she'll tell me.

1000668170.english: - I chatted with Vargr about this and that as we headed to the mess hall.
1000668170.korean: - 나는 바르그에게 이런저런 이야기를 하며 식당으로 향했다.

1000668171.english: - Vargr answered briefly or was silent at times, but she followed me, listening earnestly.
1000668171.korean: - 바르그는 짧게 짧게 대답하거나 가끔은 침묵하지만 내 말을 성실히 들어주면서 나를 따라왔다.

1000668172.english: - Whether she will truly become an Orca member remains to be seen.
1000668172.korean: - 하지만 그녀가 진정한 오르카의 대원이 될지 안 될지는 좀 더 지켜봐야 알 수 있을 것이다.

1000668174.english: Is her claim of belonging to Empress Hound a lie?

1000668175.english: Prepare a bedroom for Vargr in Empress Hound's quarters.
1000668175.korean: 엠프레시스 하운드의 숙소에 바르그의 침실을 마련해줘.

1000668178.english: Commander of Orca, the last human, someone's friend, brother, uncle, magical gentleman…
1000668178.korean: 오르카의 사령관이자, 마지막 인간, 누군가의 친구, 오빠, 아저씨, 매지컬 젠틀맨…

1000668179.english: What's your first impression of Orca?

1000668181.english: What is that in your ear?

1000668183.english: What are you listening to with the recorder?

1000668184.english: Can you tell me what you're listening to on the recorder?
1000668184.korean: 녹음기로 뭘 듣고 있는지 알려줄 수 있어?

1000668186.english: Are you reluctant to join Orca?
1000668186.korean: 혹시 오르카에 합류하는 것이 내키지 않아?

1000668187.english: Can you tell me what you've experienced so far?
1000668187.korean: 지금까지 어떤 일을 겪었는지 말해줄 수 있어?

1000668188.english: Haha. You don't have to serve someone as a master.
1000668188.korean: 하하. 꼭 주인으로 섬길 필요는 없어.

1000668189.english: Getting along with other members and working together is enough.
1000668189.korean: 다른 대원과 잘 지내고, 함께 힘 써주는 것으로 충분해.

1000668191.english: I hope you get along well with the others.

1000668192.english: Got time? If you do, I'll give you a brief introduction to Orca over a meal.
1000668192.korean: 시간 있어? 시간 있으면 밥이나 먹으면서 간단하게 오르카 소개해줄게.

1000668193.english: Okay. Is there anything you can't eat?
1000668193.korean: 알겠어. 혹시 못 먹는 거 있어?

1000668194.english: Don't worry. With Sowan here, nothing will taste bad.
1000668194.korean: 그래도 걱정 마. 소완이 있으니까 맛없는 건 없을 거야.

1000668195.english: Commander. Something about today feels different? Appearing in a swimsuit far more dazzling than any bomb—you must be at a loss… How about making tonight louder? As expected, Commander! You're as strange as I am! Tonight may hurt more, husband.
1000668195.korean: 사령관. 오늘은 뭔가 느낌이 다른 걸? 폭탄보다 훨씬 화끈한 수영복을 입고 나타나니 어쩔 줄 모르시겠나 본데…&n오늘 밤에는 좀 더 시끄럽게 보내보는 건 어때? 역시 사령관!나처럼 이상하다니까!&n오늘 밤에는 좀 더 아플지도 몰라 남편.

1000668196.english: The Boss always seemed very cautious with me; perhaps that was Boss's strategy? I was the one who got flustered first thanks to that. Trying to correct someone and getting corrected instead… still, you confessed first so I'll give some leeway. Shall I forgive you if you go through Sonia's 108 correction manuals one by one?
1000668196.korean: 보스는 날 대할 때마다 매우 신중해 보였는데, 어쩌면 그게 보스의 작전이었을려나? 덕분에 먼저 달아올라 조급해진 건 나였으니까.&n교정을 하려다 교정을 당한 꼴이라니… 그래도 고백은 보스가 먼저 해줬으니 어느 정도 정상참작은 해줄게.&n소니아의 108가지 교정 교본을 하나씩 해보는 걸로 용서해 줄까나?

1000668198.english: Flume Rider safety inspection is all finished.

1000668200.english: But did you call me to report that? Shouldn't you report to brother or Alpha sis, not me?
1000668200.korean: 그런데 그거 보고하려고 나 부른 거야? 내가 아니라 오빠나 알파 언니한테 보고해야 하는 거 아니야?

1000668203.english: I looked at the Flume Rider logs that had an issue this time...
1000668203.korean: 이번에 문제가 생긴 플룸라이더 로그를 봤는데…

1000668204.english: At the time of the accident, the output value was recorded far too high. The P multiplier here is 31.98654 times the normal value...
1000668204.korean: 사고 당시 출력값이 너무 높게 잡혀 있었어. 여기 P배수값이 통상의 31.98654배로…

1000668205.english: Did someone input the wrong number by mistake?

1000668206.english: No. Right before this I ran several test operations for the safety check... at that time it operated normally.
1000668206.korean: 아냐. 내가 직전에 안전 점검을 위해서… 몇 번이나 시험으로 운행해봤어. 그 때는 정상적으로 작동했어.

1000668207.english: Look at my panel here. Apart from the initial setup, I have never touched the P multiplier.
1000668207.korean: 여기 내 패널을 봐. 맨 처음에 세팅할 때 말고는… 내가 P배수값 건드린 적 한 번도 없어.

1000668209.english: Detailed settings like the P multiplier are basically locked, so without permission no one can change them.
1000668209.korean: P배수값 같은 세부 설정은 기본적으로 락이 걸려있어서… 권한이 없으면 아무나 못 건드려.

1000668210.english: And... there is no record of anyone changing the P multiplier before or after.
1000668210.korean: 그리고… P배수값 변경 전후에 누가 변경했다는 기록이 없어.

1000668211.english: ...It's a hack. Someone capable of doing this and only changing a single parameter — what's their scheme?
1000668211.korean: ……해킹이네. 이런 일을 할 능력이 있으면서 고작 수치 하나 바꾸는 것에서 끝내다니… 무슨 꿍꿍이지?

1000668212.english: For now I created a temporary security program... but we need a more solid countermeasure just in case.
1000668212.korean: 일단 내가 임시로 보안 프로그램을 만들어 뒀는데… 혹시 모르니까 좀 더 확실한 대책이 필요해.

1000668213.english: Got it. I'll discuss it with Alpha sis and Scathy sis.
1000668213.korean: 알겠어. 알파 언니랑 스카디 언니랑 의논해볼게.

1000668216.english: Okay. I'll call Alpha sis and Scathy sis.
1000668216.korean: 응. 그러면 나는 알파 언니랑 스카디 언니 불러올게.

1000668219.english: I was going to rest, but now I can't...

1000668220.english: Orca yearns! Twelve o'clock My Orca!
1000668220.korean: 오르카는 갈망한다! 열두 시 내 오르카!

1000668221.english: Hello, viewers. This is Spriggan reporter of Twelve O'clock My Orca!
1000668221.korean: 안녕하십니까, 시청자 여러분. 열두 시 내 오르카의 스프리건 기자입니다!

1000668222.english: After long, long repairs, the Aqua Land indoor pool is finally oooooooopennnnnnnn!
1000668222.korean: 길고 긴 수리 끝에 마침내 아쿠아 랜드 실내 수영장이 개자아아아아아아앙 되었습니다아아아아아아!

1000668234.english: I was on an outdoor mission...

1000668235.english: This time the City Guard set conservative exposure guidelines... so swimsuit materials and time became scarce... and lots of new members have joined...
1000668235.korean: 이번에 시티가드에서 노출 가이드라인을 보수적으로 잡아서… 수영복용 소재도 시간도 부족해졌다고… 그리고 새로 합류한 인원도 잔뜩 늘어서…

1000668236.english: Our Orca is not like this!

1000668238.english: S-still... Aqua Land has other attractions, right?
1000668238.korean: 그, 그래도… 아쿠아 랜드에는 다른 놀거리가 많잖아요?

1000668242.english: - The Twelve O'Clock My Orca team was busy filming again today.
1000668242.korean: - 열두 시 내 오르카 팀은 오늘도 분주하게 촬영에 임하고 있었다.

1000668243.english: - Behind them was the newly opened indoor pool and members playing there.
1000668243.korean: - 그녀들의 뒤에 뒤늦게 개장한 실내수영장과 거기서 놀고 있는 대원들이 보였다.

1000668244.english: - Some were wearing non-swimsuit clothes, but given the sudden spike in demand and shortage of supply, that could be overlooked...
1000668244.korean: - 개중에는 수영복이 아닌 옷을 입고 있는 대원들도 보였지만, 갑작스러운 수요의 증가와 공급의 부족을 생각하면 그 정도는 눈감아 줄 수 있었…

1000668247.english: Fenrir! Do not run in the pool!
1000668247.korean: 펜리르 씨! 수영장에서 달리면 안 돼요!

1000668248.english: She's not the problem for running in the pool!
1000668248.korean: 쟤는 수영장에서 달리는 게 문제가 아니잖아!

1000668251.english: Why are you so late, Admiral! The star of the festival mustn't be missing!
1000668251.korean: 왜 이리 늦었나, 제독! 축제의 주역이 빠져선 안 되지!

1000668253.english: Um! Um! The Minister of Finance Meptrite was causing a scene to me.
1000668253.korean: 음! 음! 엠피트리테 재정부 장관이 나에게 진상했다.

1000668254.english: Keen insight, and truly full of loyalty, isn't it.
1000668254.korean: 안목도 뛰어나지만 참으로 충성심이 넘치지 않는가.

1000668255.english: In any case, it pleases me to hear the Admiral's praise!

1000668256.english: - I patted the head of the cheerfully smiling Melite.

1000668257.english: Mmm… at other times I might have felt it was treating me like a child, but…
1000668257.korean: 으음… 다른 때라면 어린애 취급을 하는 거 같아서 꺼리겠지만…

1000668258.english: Well… today it's fine! Just for today I'll play without restraint!
1000668258.korean: 뭐... 오늘은 괜찮다! 오늘 만큼은 나도 거리낌 없이 놀 것이다!

1000668259.english: So Admiral, you too must do your best to enjoy yourself!

1000668260.english: If you do not enjoy it, others cannot enjoy themselves properly either.
1000668260.korean: 그대가 즐기지 못하면 다른 이들도 제대로 즐기지 못한다.

1000668261.english: The one who reigns must set the example for subordinates to follow. So come this way. Let's ride that Plume Rider over there!
1000668261.korean: 군림하는 자가 본을 보여야 부하들이 그 뒤를 따르지 않겠나. 그러니 이리로 오도록. 저기 있는 플룸라이더를 타보자!

1000668262.english: - Agreeing with Melite's words that if I played, the other members could relax and play too, I followed her.
1000668262.korean: - 내가 놀아야 다른 대원들도 마음 놓고 놀 수 있다는 멜리테의 말에 공감하며 나는 멜리테를 따랐다.

1000668264.english: - In the indoor pool we rode various rides.
1000668264.korean: - 실내수영장에서 우리는 이런 저런 기구를 타고.

1000668266.english: As expected, it is extremely fun! Admiral, shall we ride once more?
1000668266.korean: 역시 예상했던 대로 무척 즐겁다! 한 번 더 타겠나, 제독?

1000668267.english: Hm. I overlooked that. Who would serve one who enjoys alone without sharing?
1000668267.korean: 음. 그것을 간과했군. 베풀지 않고 혼자 즐기려는 자를 누가 섬기겠나.

1000668268.english: As expected of the Admiral, your thoughts run deep.

1000668269.english: - That is what we decided to do.

1000668270.english: - When hungry, we bought food from stalls inside the waterpark.
1000668270.korean: - 배가 고파지면 워터파크 내의 노점에서 음식을 사 먹고,

1000668271.english: Admiral, could you spare me one bite of ramen?
1000668271.korean: 제독, 라면 한 젓가락만 줄 수 있나?

1000668272.english: Very well. The contract is sealed.

1000668274.english: Don't gulp it down, Admiral. I won't complain even if you eat it all. Here, have some soda.
1000668274.korean: 허겁지겁 먹지마라, 제독. 다 먹어도 뭐라고 할 생각이 없으니. 자, 여기 사이다도 있다.

1000668275.english: - Once refreshed, we played in the water again.

1000668276.english: Kyaahahaha! How is it, Admiral? The taste of my water gun? The ultimate weapon created with support from Gremlin and Fortune.
1000668276.korean: 꺄하하하하! 어떤가, 제독? 나의 물총의 맛이? 그렘린과 포츈의 지원을 받아 만든 궁극의 무기지.

1000668277.english: Hm? W-wait. Isn't that a bit too close, Admiral?
1000668277.korean: 응? 자, 잠깐. 너무 가까운 거 아닌가, 제독?

1000668278.english: …Admiral? P-physical combat is against the rules!

1000668279.english: Truce! Let's make a pact, one that both sides consent to…
1000668279.korean: 조약! 조약을 맺자. 서로간의 동의를 얻을 수 있는…

1000668283.english: - We had such a fun time that we lost track of how much time had passed.
1000668283.korean: - 어떻게 시간이 흘렀는지 모를 정도로 즐거운 시간을 보냈다.

1000668284.english: - Not because it was late, but because we were too exhausted to keep playing, we stopped and lay side by side on the mat.
1000668284.korean: - 시간이 늦어서가 아니라 더 이상 놀기 힘들 정도로 지쳐서 노는 것을 멈춘 우리는 나란히 돗자리에 누웠다.

1000668286.english: - Melite called to me in a drowsy voice and hugged me.
1000668286.korean: - 멜리테는 나른한 목소리로 나를 부르더니 나를 끌어안았다.

1000668287.english: - Stroking her head, she gave a quiet laugh.
1000668287.korean: - 그런 멜리테의 머리를 쓰다듬어주니 그녀는 나지막하게 웃었다.

1000668288.english: To play to my heart's content, to eat my fill, and to cling to the Admiral's arms like a spoiled child—could I be happier than this?
1000668288.korean: 마음껏 뛰놀고, 배불리 먹고, 제독의 품에 안겨 어리광을 부리니 이보다 행복할 수 있겠는가?

1000668290.english: But this time must be a midsummer's dream.
1000668290.korean: 하지만 이 시간은 한 여름의 꿈이겠지.

1000668291.english: - Just moments ago laughing innocently, Melite now spoke in a mature tone.
1000668291.korean: - 방금 전까지 천진난만하게 웃고 떠들던 멜리테는 어른스러운 말투로 말을 이었다.

1000668292.english: Dreams are only dreams. The place where we must set our feet and live is reality.
1000668292.korean: 꿈은 어디까지나 꿈. 우리가 발 디디고 살아야하는 곳은 현실이다.

1000668293.english: If we let dreams intoxicate us and forget reality, then we lose both dreams and reality.
1000668293.korean: 꿈에 취해 현실을 잊는다면 꿈도, 현실도 모든 것을 잃게 될 것이다.

1000668294.english: But even if it is a midsummer's dream, there is no need to reject the sweetness it gives. While we can dream, let us enjoy this sweetness to the fullest.
1000668294.korean: 그러나 한 여름의 꿈일지라도 꿈이 주는 달콤함을 거부할 필요는 없을 것이다. 꿈을 꿀 수 있는 동안에는 이 달콤함을 마음껏 즐기자.

1000668295.english: - Melite said that much and gave a small yawn.
1000668295.korean: - 멜리테는 거기까지 말하고 작게 하품을 했다.

1000668296.english: So… until I wake… I hope you will stay by my side.
1000668296.korean: 그러니… 내가 깰 때까지… 옆에 있어주길 바란다.

1000668298.english: - Melite yawned softly and closed her eyes.
1000668298.korean: - 멜리테는 작게 하품을 하고 눈을 감았다.

1000668299.english: - I waited until her breathing grew steady, then I spoke.
1000668299.korean: - 멜리테의 숨소리가 고르게 변할 때까지 기다린 후에 나는 말했다.

1000668300.english: - Saying that, I too closed my eyes.
1000668300.korean: - 그렇게 말하고 나 또한 눈을 감았다.

1000668301.english: Ohhh! Have you seen that drama? A masterpiece, isn't it!? Truly a masterpiece!? I first read the manga that drama was based on, then searched it up and found out about the drama. Later I went out of my way to watch it, and—khhh! As expected, a masterpiece! Masterpieces give birth to more masterpieces! Of course there are cases where it calls for tomatoes, but not this time!
1000668301.korean: 오오! 그 드라마 보셨나요? 명작이죠!? 진짜 명작이죠!? 저도 그 드라마 원작인 만화책을 보고 따로 검색을 해보고 드라마의 존재를 알았어요. 그래서 나중에 어떻게든 찾아서 드라마도 봤는데, 크으으으! 역시 명작! 명작은 명작을 낳고! 물론 토마토를 부르는 사례도 있지만 이건 아니었죠!

1000668302.english: Up to the middle, the story proceeded similarly. But when the drama caught up to the manga, it went into an original storyline, yet the progression didn't feel unnatural at all! Unlike the manga, there were almost no new characters introduced, but the existing characters alone made for an interesting story.
1000668302.korean: 초중반까지는 비슷하게 진행되던 이야기. 하지만 원작 만화책의 진도를 드라마가 따라잡아서 결국엔 오리지널 스토리로 나갔지만 전혀 부자연스러움이 없는 전개! 만화책과는 달리 새로운 캐릭터의 등장이 거의 없었지만 기존 캐릭터들만으로도 충분히 흥미로운 이야기가 만들어졌죠.

1000668303.english: And in the manga the male and female leads parted for each other's sake, but in the drama they overcame hardships and reached a happy ending together! The manga had higher story completeness, but the drama had far more popularity!
1000668303.korean: 그리고 만화책에서는 남자주인공과 여자주인공이 서로를 위해서 헤어지는 결말이었지만, 드라마에서는 어떻게든 고난을 이겨내고 함께 행복해지는 해피엔딩! 스토리의 완성도는 만화책이 더 높았지만, 대중성은 드라마가 훨씬 높았다고 하죠!

1000668304.english: I got spoiled for the comic! I haven't read the comic yet!
1000668304.korean: 나 만화책 스포일러 당했어! 나 아직 만화책 안 봤단 말이야!

1000668306.english: - Because it was noisy, I peeked my face out and saw Orangeade and Galatea talking.
1000668306.korean: - 뭔가 소란스러워서 슬쩍 얼굴을 내비추니 오렌지에이드와 갈라테아가 이야기를 나누고 있었다.

1000668307.english: - Orangeade who likes comics and Galatea who likes dramas. And since their personalities are somewhat similar, of course they would get along well.
1000668307.korean: - 만화책을 좋아하는 오렌지에이드와 드라마를 좋아하는 갈라테아. 그리고 성격도 어느 정도 비슷하니 죽이 잘 맞을 수밖에 없겠지.

1000668308.english: Ah, then have you seen this drama? This one is also based on a comic. Five friends visited a countryside village. But it turned out the village was haunted, so the five friends were tormented by ghosts…
1000668308.korean: 아, 그러면 이 드라마는 보셨나요? 이것도 만화책 원작인데. 5명의 친구들이 한 시골마을을 찾았는데. 그 마을이 알고 보니 귀신이 들린 마을이라 5명의 친구들이 귀신들에게 시달리는…

1000668309.english: I can't watch scary things with ghosts!
1000668309.korean: 나, 귀신 나오는 무서운 거 못 봐!

1000668311.english: ……Huh? The plot is like that, but the genre is comedy though?

1000668312.english: Ah. Then I can watch it.

1000668313.english: - It seems Galatea has adapted well to Orca.
1000668313.korean: - 갈라테아는 오르카에 잘 적응한 거 같다.

1000668315.english: - As soon as Galatea made eye contact with me, she ran toward me.
1000668315.korean: - 갈라테아는 나와 눈이 마주치자마자 나에게 달려왔다.

1000668319.english: - Well. Adapting well isn't a bad thing.
1000668319.korean: - 뭐. 적응 잘한다고 나쁠 건 없지.

1000668322.english: Orange! Let's continue our conversation later!

1000668323.english: I'm currently feeling a very deep sense of betrayal here!?
1000668323.korean: 저는 지금 매우 깊은 배신감을 느끼고 있는 중인데요!?

1000668324.english: So women's friendship is a fleeting thing that disappears when a single man comes between…
1000668324.korean: 여자의 우정이란 한 명의 남자가 끼어들면 사라지는 허무한 것이로구나…

1000668325.english: Correct! A line from ‘Young Lady, Welcome!' when the female protagonist sees her friend and the male protagonist getting along well!
1000668325.korean: 정답! ‘영애님, 어서오세요!’에서 여자 주인공이 친구랑 남자주인공이 사이좋게 지내는 것을 볼 때 한 대사!

1000668327.english: Since you got the answer right, I'll let you go nicely.

1000668331.english: - Are these really kids who haven't even known each other for two weeks?
1000668331.korean: - 얘네들 만난지 보름도 안 된 애들 맞지?

1000668332.english: - When extreme sociability meets extreme sociability, a deep friendship forms even without much time together.
1000668332.korean: - 극한의 친화력이 극한의 친화력을 만나니 함께 지낸 시간이 길지 않아도 깊은 우정이 형성되었다.

1000668333.english: So where should we go, honey?

1000668335.english: Ah. Do you hate girls who act too close?
1000668335.korean: 아. 너무 친한 척하는 여자는 싫어?

1000668336.english: Then I'll fix it. Starting with the title. Which one do you like? Commander? Former commander? Admiral? Big Brother? Darling? Senpai? Master? Daddy?
1000668336.korean: 그러면 고칠 게. 일단 호칭부터. 어떤 게 좋아? 사령관님? 전단장님? 제독? 오빠? 달링? 선배? 주인님? 아빠?

1000668339.english: - Galatea muttered honey honey a few times.

1000668340.english: - And then she looked at my hand and asked.

1000668341.english: Um… can I hold your hand?

1000668343.english: - Galatea held my hand and looked very happy.
1000668343.korean: - 갈라테아는 내 손을 잡고는 무척 행복해했다.

1000668344.english: Alright! Then to be even happier, leeeet's go!
1000668344.korean: 좋아! 그러면 더 행복해지기 위해서 출! 발!

1000668345.english: - Shouting like that, Galatea pulled me along. I started walking after her.
1000668345.korean: - 갈라테아는 그렇게 외치고 나를 잡아 끌었다. 나는 그녀를 따라 걷기 시작했다.

1000668347.english: - Galatea failed the claw machine and screamed.

1000668348.english: - Since it was her first time playing, I wanted to comfort her that it's normal to not do well…
1000668348.korean: - 처음 하는 게임이니 잘 못 할 수도 있다고 위로해주고 싶었지만…

1000668349.english: - But seeing that the tuna cans she bought during the game were already more expensive than just buying the doll, I couldn't stay out of it.
1000668349.korean: - 게임하면서 결제한 참치캔이 그냥 인형을 사는 것보다 많아지니 안 끼어들 수가 없었다.

1000668351.english: - I worried she might keep going with burning competitiveness, but Galatea obediently stepped back.
1000668351.korean: - 승부욕을 불태우며 계속 하면 어쩌나 싶었지만 갈라테아는 순순히 물러났다.

1000668352.english: - I paid with the admission ticket and challenged the claw machine.

1000668353.english: - First attempt was a failure. But that's okay. It was just a try to observe the strength and movement of the claw.
1000668353.korean: - 첫 번째 도전은 실패. 하지만 괜찮다. 집게의 힘과 움직임을 살피기 위해서 한 도전이었다.

1000668354.english: - The second attempt failed. It was an attempt to move the doll to an easier spot, so this is fine too.
1000668354.korean: - 두 번째 도전은 실패. 인형을 뽑기 쉬운 곳으로 옮기기 위한 도전이었으니 이것도 괜찮다.

1000668355.english: - The third attempt... failed. I thought I had grabbed the slender part well, but it was pushed by another doll next to it and fell. It's a shame, but next time I'll definitely succeed.
1000668355.korean: - 세 번째 도전은… 실패. 갸름한 부분을 잘 잡았다고 생각했는데, 옆의 다른 인형에 밀려서 떨어트리고 말았다. 아깝지만 다음 번에는 무조건 성공이다.

1000668359.english: - I made an attempt, though I didn't know which number it was.
1000668359.korean: - 나는 몇 번째일지 모를 시도를 했다.

1000668362.english: Ah... that's not how you do it...
1000668362.korean: 아… 그거 그렇게 하는 거 아닌데…

1000668363.english: - Gremlin stood beside me and peered into the claw machine.
1000668363.korean: - 그렘린이 슬쩍 내 옆에 서서 뽑기 기계 안을 살폈다.

1000668364.english: I'd like to pick it for you or open the machine and take it out...
1000668364.korean: 마음 같아선 제가 뽑아드리거나, 기계를 열어서 빼드리고는 싶지만…

1000668366.english: A gamer can't just lose and run away.
1000668366.korean: 지고 도망치는 건 게이머에게 있을 수는 없죠.

1000668367.english: Instead, I'll tell you a few precautions.
1000668367.korean: 대신에 몇 가지 주의할 점만 알려드릴게요.

1000668368.english: - Gremlin told me claw machine techniques I didn't know.
1000668368.korean: - 그렘린은 내가 몰랐던 뽑기기계의 노하우를 알려줬다.

1000668369.english: - It was know-how that would be top secret in the game zone.

1000668371.english: - Gremlin said that and operated the claw machine next to us.
1000668371.korean: - 그렘린은 그렇게 말하고 옆에 있는 인형뽑기기계를 조작했다.

1000668373.english: - Gremlin, who picked the doll in one go, said confidently.
1000668373.korean: - 한 번에 인형을 뽑은 그렘린이 당당하게 말했다.

1000668376.english: - Following Gremlin's know-how, the doll was easily grabbed. The claw slipped into the doll's loop and the doll was lifted.
1000668376.korean: - 그렘린의 노하우대로 하니 쉽게 인형이 잡혔다. 인형의 고리 부분에 집게가 들어가더니 인형이 딸려 올라왔다.

1000668377.english: - And the claw headed straight for the exit and then spread its legs above the exit.
1000668377.korean: - 그리고 집개는 그대로 배출구로 향하더니 배출구 위에서 다리를 벌렸다.

1000668379.english: - The doll's loop got caught on the claw's jaw and wouldn't come off.
1000668379.korean: - 인형의 고리가 집게의 턱에 걸려서 빠지지 않았다.

1000668381.english: - There's nothing to be done about this...

1000668383.english: Thank you, honey. I'll treasure it.

1000668384.english: - Galatea hugged the doll I gave her and smiled.
1000668384.korean: - 갈라테아는 내가 선물한 인형을 끌어안고 웃었다.

1000668385.english: Giving me a gift... it's not an exaggeration to interpret it as already becoming family, right?
1000668385.korean: 나에게 선물을 준다는 것은… 이미 한 가족이 되었다고 해석해도 과언이 아니지?

1000668387.english: But your trying to win a doll for me was really cool.
1000668387.korean: 하지만 나를 위해서 인형을 뽑으려는 모습은 엄청 멋졌어.

1000668388.english: I was already smitten, but now I'm even more smitten.

1000668389.english: We've played enough here, so let's go somewhere else.
1000668389.korean: 여기선 충분히 놀았으니까 다른 곳에 가자.

1000668390.english: Ah! If honey wants to play more, we can stay longer.
1000668390.korean: 아! 허니가 더 놀고 싶다면 더 있자.

1000668391.english: Thanks. Then let's go to the pool.

1000668392.english: I'll show you how well I can swim.

1000668395.english: - We arrived at the pool with Galatea.

1000668396.english: - Galatea boldly said she'd show off her swimming skill, but after swimming a bit she stayed by my side.
1000668396.korean: - 갈라테아는 자신의 수영솜씨를 보여주겠다고 당당하게 말했지만 수영은 조금 하다 말고 내 옆을 계속 지키고 있었다.

1000668397.english: Uu... C-Commander? Would you like to... play beach volleyball together?
