1000668397.korean: 으으… 사, 사령관님? 같이… 비치발리볼 하지 않으실래요?

1000668398.english: Beach volleyball? Then won't you play with the Cannoneer? I need someone to practice with.
1000668398.korean: 비치발리볼? 그러면 캐노니어랑 같이 안 할래? 연습할 상대가 필요하거든.

1000668400.korean: 좋아! 여기 선수 한 명 추가요!

1000668401.english: It's okay if you're not confident in your skill. We even have the example of Arsenal's captain.
1000668401.korean: 실력에 자신 없어도 괜찮아. 우리에게는 아스널 대장이라는 사례도 있으니까.

1000668402.english: The commander is here? If you're here, say you're here!

1000668403.english: If you're free, let's play together!

1000668404.english: Kya-hat! For some reason Salamander returned the stolen tuna cans so I paid for what I ordered long ago and received it this time.
1000668404.korean: 캬하핫! 웬일인지 샐러맨더가 참치캔 털어간 거 돌려줘서 옛날에 주문한 거 이번에 지불하고 받았어.

1000668405.english: If you agree now you can also see Kamel's embarrassing moment as a bonus.
1000668405.korean: 지금 승낙하면 카멜의 부끄러운 모습도 덤으로 볼 수 있다고.

1000668406.english: Wait, Wooolf! Don't drag me by force!

1000668407.english: You say you don't want to with your mouth but your body is honest? You're being pulled along obediently, aren't you?
1000668407.korean: 입으로는 싫다고 하면서 몸은 정직한데? 순순히 끌려오는 것을 보면?

1000668408.english: Hm. As expected, a self-proclaimed common-sense person. Claiming common sense while camping naked outdoors... ugk!
1000668408.korean: 음. 역시 자칭 상식인. 상식인을 자청하면서 야외에서 알몸으로 캠... 컥!

1000668409.english: Huh? It's true. Why hide it?

1000668410.english: Stripping clothes completely while on an outdoor mission... ugk!
1000668410.korean: 야외에서 임무 수행 중에 옷 홀딱 벗고… 컥!

1000668411.english: Stop harping on it, you guys!

1000668413.english: - I was standing still when the other members started talking to me.
1000668413.korean: - 내가 혼자 가만히 있으면 다른 대원들이 말을 걸었기 때문이다.

1000668414.english: - Seeing Galatea make an awkward smile, I spoke.
1000668414.korean: - 갈라테아가 난처한 웃음을 짓는 것을 보고 말했다.

1000668416.english: - We had a late lunch at the food court.

1000668417.english: - Galatea spoke as if deeply moved in front of the food.
1000668417.korean: - 갈라테아는 음식 앞에서 감개무량하다는 듯이 말했다.

1000668418.english: Ah, when I was in Malta back then it was nowhere near this extravagant.
1000668418.korean: 아아, 옛날에 몰타에 있을 때 랑은 비교도 안 되게 호화스러워.

1000668419.english: Yeah. The Saman Industry Supply Office is on Sicily near Malta Island, so whatever could be sold was sold, and Mel the queen… back then she was Princess Mel. Princess Mel sometimes picked up rare things and sold them to get daily necessities, but it was still always lacking.
1000668419.korean: 응. 삼안 산업 물자 영업소가 몰타섬 근처에 있는 시칠리아섬에 있어서 팔 수 있는 것은 다 팔고, 멜 여왕님… 그 때는 멜 공주님이었구나. 멜 공주님이 가끔씩 진귀한 것을 주워 와서 그것도 팔아서 생필품을 구했는데, 그래도 언제나 부족했어.

1000668420.english: Food was especially scarce. Malta Island wasn't good for farming, so self-sufficiency was difficult. I had to use the ship's guns to fish.
1000668420.korean: 특히나 식량이 부족했어. 몰타섬이 농사도 잘 안 되는 곳이라 자급자족하기가 쉽지 않았어. 내가 함포를 써서 물고기잡이를 해야 했을 정도지.

1000668421.english: The absolute amount of food was always insufficient, so we were always hungry.
1000668421.korean: 식량의 절대적인 양은 언제나 부족해서 항상 배가 고픈 채로 지냈어.

1000668422.english: - I remembered the Mermaid unit members who joined Orca looking emaciated.
1000668422.korean: - 빼빼 마른 채로 오르카에 합류했던 머메이드의 대원들을 떠올렸다.

1000668423.english: So when I met the Mermaid friends I had parted from this time and saw their faces, I was really happy that they seemed to be doing well.
1000668423.korean: 그래서 이번에 헤어졌던 머메이드 친구들 다시 만났을 때 얼굴을 보니까 잘 지내는 거 같아서 엄청 기뻤어.

1000668424.english: - I recalled the mistake of trying to abruptly improve supplies in a situation where the past infrastructure wasn't properly established.
1000668424.korean: - 과거에 기반이 제대로 잡혀 있지 않던 상황에 무작정 급양개선을 하려던 과오가 떠올랐다.

1000668425.english: - But what was lacking was gradually replenished and after several trials and errors we reached this point, so it was by no means meaningless.
1000668425.korean: - 하지만 부족했던 것은 조금씩 보충되고 몇 번의 시행착오 끝에 여기까지 도달할 수 있었으니 결코 무의미하지 않았다.

1000668429.english: No, if you're not busy could you taste the food we made?
1000668429.korean: 아뇨, 안 바쁘시다면 저희가 만든 음식 좀 맛 봐주실 수 있나 해서요.

1000668431.english: - Night Angel said that and put a salad on the table.
1000668431.korean: - 나이트 앤젤은 그렇게 말하며 테이블 위에 샐러드를 올려놨다.

1000668433.english: ……Someone from our unit used up all the major meat-like ingredients developing a new dish… but the stall application was already submitted… buying new ingredients would strain the budget… demand is too high so supply can't keep up…
1000668433.korean: ……저희 부대의 누구 씨가… 새 요리를 개발한다고 고기 같은 주요한 재료를 다 써먹어서… 그런데 출점 신청은 이미 된 상태고… 새 재료를 사오자니 예산도 부족하고… 수요가 너무 많아서 공급도 안 되고…

1000668435.english: Oh? Commander. Are you tasting it now?

1000668436.english: Then this time I will especially give you the sandwich this cute Linty is selling.
1000668436.korean: 그러면 이번에는 특별히 이 귀여운 린티가 팔고 있는 샌드위치를 드릴 게요.

1000668437.english: I'll cut it into a cute heart shape for you.

1000668438.english: I heard you'd eat and then advertise it, Master.
1000668438.korean: 음식을 드시고 광고를 해주신다고 들었어요, 주인님.

1000668439.english: It's embarrassing, but could you also try our milk pudding?
1000668439.korean: 부끄럽지만 저희가 만든 우유 푸딩도 부탁드려도 될까요?

1000668440.english: When you eat it, put syrup to your taste.
1000668440.korean: 드실 때 취향에 맞는 시럽을 뿌리시면 돼요.

1000668441.english: We want to enter the food court cooking contest too.

1000668442.english: The menu name is "Brigadier's Birthday Breakfast."
